subject: I’m going to the border with President Trump
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/da1b82591284/i-was-just-at-our-southern-border-4931198?e=13f35c4add)
---
| |
---
| Friend,

**We are just 48 hours away from our end of the quarter deadline** , and I wanted to provide an exclusive update to my most trusted supporters:

**_I will be heading to our southern border tomorrow with President Trump to see the crisis firsthand and expose Biden and Harris._**

Biden and Harris have ignored the crisis at our southern border. They’ve let hundreds of thousands of illegal crossings, record-setting drugs, and suspected terrorists and human traffickers enter our country.

**Their inaction puts every single American at risk. That’s why I am joining President Trump on this critical border trip. **

**President Trump worked hard to secure our border. His policies drove down illegal entries and made our nation safe and secure **– and unlike VP Harris, the President and I will be in the Rio Grande Valley, where the crisis is at its worst.

**While she hides from her job, I’ll be with President Trump exposing her failed policies – and we need you. We need to make sure every American hears the truth on this issue. **

[_> >> Join my southern border security fund by rushing $10, $30, or $50. Like me, I know you love our country and are ready to put it first and secure our border <<<_](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=d5f88c5ad8&e=13f35c4add)

Stay tuned on this trip – I am going to be bringing back everything I saw with the President to you. **We know the media is covering for Biden, and we know Democrats refuse to call him out – I will make sure you have the information you need.**

Best,
Chris Jacobs

clean_body: | | | | | | Friend, We are just 48 hours away from our end of the quarter deadline , and I wanted to provide an exclusive update to my most trusted supporters: I will be heading to our southern border tomorrow with President Trump to see the crisis firsthand and expose Biden and Harris. Biden and Harris have ignored the crisis at our southern border. They’ve let hundreds of thousands of illegal crossings, record-setting drugs, and suspected terrorists and human traffickers enter our country. Their inaction puts every single American at risk. That’s why I am joining President Trump on this critical border trip. President Trump worked hard to secure our border. His policies drove down illegal entries and made our nation safe and secure – and unlike VP Harris, the President and I will be in the Rio Grande Valley, where the crisis is at its worst. While she hides from her job, I’ll be with President Trump exposing her failed policies – and we need you. We need to make sure every American hears the truth on this issue. Stay tuned on this trip – I am going to be bringing back everything I saw with the President to you. We know the media is covering for Biden, and we know Democrats refuse to call him out – I will make sure you have the information you need. Best, Chris Jacobs | | | "DONATE" | | | | JACOBS FOR CONGRESS P.O. Box 387 CLARENCE, NY 14031 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

clean_body: | | | | This is OUR time Friend, This is our FIRST End-of-Quarter deadline of 2021 and all eyes are on us. Murkowski and the rest of the DC Swamp are hoping we fail to meet our End-of-Quarter goal. But what they don’t know is that I have you on Team Kelly! President Trump’s Endorsement of our campaign was HUGE! Now we need to show the Swamp what happens when we fight back with REAL Grassroots support! This is the first step to DEFEATING the Radical Left. The DC Insiders will do whatever it takes to keep Murkowski in power even by dumping in millions into this race! They know she is a reliable vote for their Swampy and Extremist agenda! For Alaska, Kelly P.S. -- Team Kelly needs Conservatives like you to join the fight! kellyforak.com | | | | ==

Just two years back, our legislature became the _first majority female state legislature in the country._ This was a landmark moment for Nevada as a whole and the fight for equal representation in our state.
And with Democrats in charge, we’re expanding access to health care for working families, protecting voting rights, and putting science first as we tackle this pandemic.
**Elect Nevada Democrats is fighting to make progress this upcoming election by protecting our state legislative seats, re-electing Gov. clean_body: | | | | | We’re only 3 SEATS away from losing our Democratic majority in the Nevada State Senate. Here’s why this matters: the state legislature decides on critically important issues that impact everyday Nevadans. This includes local voting laws, women’s reproductive rights, union labor laws, public education funding, and so much more. Here at Elect Nevada Democrats, we support on-the-ground mobilization efforts to elect Democratic candidates up and down the ballot. That said, our work wouldn’t be complete without your help. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Just two years back, our legislature became the first majority female state legislature in the country. This was a landmark moment for Nevada as a whole and the fight for equal representation in our state. And with Democrats in charge, we’re expanding access to health care for working families, protecting voting rights, and putting science first as we tackle this pandemic. Elect Nevada Democrats is fighting to make progress this upcoming election by protecting our state legislative seats, re-electing Gov. Sisolak, and keeping Catherine Cortez Masto in the Senate. | | | | | | | | | | | | Thanks, Rebecca Lambe | | If you'd like to support Elect Nevada Democrats, you can | Paid for by Home Means Nevada PAC. The Democrat Machine is dumping millions into Arizona right now, doing the early work needed to protect the Senate seat they picked up last cycle.

clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. I’m emailing you because my husband Dr. Raul Ruiz needs your help. Raul is the most selfless person I know. He ran for Congress for the very same reason he became an emergency room physician: | | | | | | | My husband was on the frontlines helping the most vulnerable Americans during this health crisis. I know deep down Raul hates to ask you for money, but the truth is he can’t fight off far-right attacks and protect our Democracy without you. Raul’s campaign is powered by generous grassroots donations and I know that having your support would mean the world to him. | Yours, Monica Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. The facts speak for themselves: Every Republican in Florida’s congressional delegation -- every single one! -- opposed the American Rescue Plan, which put $1,400 checks into people’s hands during the pandemic. = Marco Rubio and Rick Scott both voted to acquit Donald Trump. Twice. = Rubio, Scott, and Republican members of the House have voted repeatedly to gut Floridians’ access to health care, all while offering absolutely no plans of their own. = = | = At this point, it’s not all that important whether Florida’s Republicans are failing by accident or failing on purpose. What matters is that the people of Florida deserve better than this. And with your help, we’ll keep up the fight. Thanks, Team Murphy = | | Paid for by Stephanie Murphy for Congress | Stephanie Murphy for Congress PO Box 205 Winter Park, FL 32790 United States | We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can . Your grassroots support is critical to helping Stephanie become a strong voice for all of Florida. name: Mark Warner
subject: FW: Right now is a make or break moment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
I just got off the phone with Terry.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31593185/293125916/-2023814932?refcode=20210629.1_MW_6CK&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Yzg3MTk0OC1kY2Q4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0SSMthNl8XvG8TJCdm9PkCDvznXtY0j3KASPA2Pf5Ac=)

| | Derek,

I just got off the phone with Terry and he’s over the moon about the grassroots response we’ve seen since I emailed you.

It’s a great start, but we can’t let up. With less than 48 hours until the deadline, Terry’s campaign still needs more than 1,100 donations to reach their end-of-quarter goal.

Look, Glenn Youngkin might have $75 million and Donald Trump, but Terry has something better: you and an army of grassroots supporters ready to rise up and stop Trumpism from taking over our Commonwealth.

**[Please, make a contribution of $27 or anything you can afford to help Terry McAuliffe stop Glenn Youngkin and Donald Trump.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31593186/293125917/1097049879?refcode=20210629.1_MW_6CK&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Yzg3MTk0OC1kY2Q4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0SSMthNl8XvG8TJCdm9PkCDvznXtY0j3KASPA2Pf5Ac=)

Thanks again,

Mark Warner \---------- Forwarded Message ----------
From: **Mark Warner**
Subject: Right now is a make or break moment
> Derek, this is a make or break moment for the Commonwealth. I’m proud to support Terry McAuliffe to be our next Governor and I need you with me. Virginia has made incredible progress under Terry’s leadership, but we know that progress is fragile. So here’s the bottom line:
>
> Election experts are saying this race will be too close to call. We know Republicans and their nominee will have an unlimited amount of cash to buy up Virginia’s airwaves and smear Terry. That means if we don’t step up and make sure Terry’s campaign has the resources to fight back, he could lose and Trumpism will be on the rise in Virginia.
>

clean_body: I just got off the phone with Terry. | | | = | | Derek, I just got off the phone with Terry and he’s over the moon about the grassroots response we’ve seen since I emailed you. It’s a great start, but we can’t let up. With less than 48 hours until the deadline, Terry’s campaign still needs more than 1,100 donations to reach their end-of-quarter goal. Look, Glenn Youngkin might have $75 million and Donald Trump, but Terry has something better: you and an army of grassroots supporters ready to rise up and stop Trumpism from taking over our Commonwealth. = Thanks again, Mark Warner \---------- Forwarded Message ---------- From: Mark Warner Subject: Right now is a make or break moment Derek, this is a make or break moment for the Commonwealth. I’m proud to support Terry McAuliffe to be our next Governor and I need you with me. Virginia has made incredible progress under Terry’s leadership, but we know that progress is fragile. So here’s the bottom line: Election experts are saying this race will be too close to call. We know Republicans and their nominee will have an unlimited amount of cash to buy up Virginia’s airwaves and smear Terry. That means if we don’t step up and make sure Terry’s campaign has the resources to fight back, he could lose and Trumpism will be on the rise in Virginia. = Terry was an incredible Governor for Virginia and he will be again. Under his leadership, Virginia’s economy saw historic growth. A record number of voting rights were restored. And over and over again, Terry stood as a brick wall to stop extreme elements in the Virginia Republican legislature. But now, as Terry takes on a well-funded, Trump-backed Republican nominee for Governor, that is all on the line. =** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = --- | = --- | | = --- | = --- | | = --- | = --- Thank you, Mark Warner = Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 31408 Alexandria, VA 22310 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. subject: POLL: Do you still support Trump?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
| Peter,
Despite the Democrats doing everything in their power to reverse all our America First progress - Republican voters still believe in President Trump and the job he did Making America Great Again!

Take a look at a few of President Trump's wins, Peter:
1. Strengthened our military
2. Rebuilt of economy
3. Fortified our border
4. Held China accountable
5. Protected our Second Amendment rights
6. Lowered our taxes

President Trump WON for America, but now we need to hear from YOU. [**Do you still support President Trump?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57828637:JlBrDDlwN:m:1:3253819041:8217BAC9E67BC1A135372C127FA30893:r)

We can't let the left and the FAKE NEWS media lie and manipulate the truth about the work President Trump accomplished during his four years in office.

Despite working tirelessly to put America First, the left was determined to try and undermine his success with their Anti-Trump agenda.

[**Let us know where you stand right now!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57828637:JlBrDDlwN:m:1:3253819041:8217BAC9E67BC1A135372C127FA30893:r)

clean_body: If we invest in Senate races like this one, we will give Democrats a solid chance of protecting our majority. | = = During this high-stakes election, Peter, flipping this Senate seat blue will be more important than ever. Our Democratic Majority is on the line, and it will all come down to Wisconsin. If we invest in Senate races like this one, we will give Democrats a solid chance of protecting our majority. That’s the only way we can pass crucial legislation like the For the People Act and a comprehensive infrastructure bill. Time and time again, people like Ron Johnson and Mitch McConnell have shown their true colors by working for the special interests, not everyday people. They continue to stall legislation that would help millions of Wisconsinites. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, Team Lasry | ** | | We need to re-think how our economy works, and we need new voices in Washington. name: Amy Ryan Courser
subject: Winning back the House
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY AMY RYAN COURSER FOR CONGRESS
body:
The top priority of every concerned American is clear - send
Democrat lawmakers packing.

Team -

Over the last five months,
Democrats exposed their radical plans for the future of our
nation. From rising inflation to the out-of-control border
crisis, Democrats seem intent on destroying the stability created
by the previous administration.

The top priority of every
concerned American should be clear - we must send Democrat
lawmakers packing. The future of our nation depends on ensuring
Democrats do not control Congress for another two years.

Republicans are only FIVE seats
away from taking back the House of Representatives. Removing
Nancy Pelosi from power and diminishing the influence of The
Squad is possible. But we need your help.

WIN BACK THE HOUSE

My Democrat opponent, Kurt
Schrader, is vulnerable. Just last year, I received the highest
number of votes for a Republican in our district's history. With
your help, we can flip the seat in 2022 and block Democrats'
radical agenda. Will you contribute $100, $75, or even just $25
to help us win back the House today?

Our end-of-month funding deadline
is quickly approaching - and we are behind $4,332. Your
contribution today helps ensure we have the support we need to
take back the House.

WIN BACK THE HOUSE

Joe Biden has caved to radical leftists on every critical issue,
including national and border security, unprecedented spending,
and federal over-regulation. In just two short years, the Squad
took over the Democrat Party. We cannot afford to see what will
happen if Democrats hold the House for another two years.

Rather than stand up to The
Squad, Democrats grovel to them. They pick partisan priorities
over constituent concerns. When confronted, they double down on
the reckless policies and defer to The Squad. Despite his
attempts to appear different, Kurt Schrader follows his party's
radical lead in the end. The fact is Schrader votes with Nancy
Pelosi 98% of the time.

It's up to Patriots like you and
me to get America back on track by standing up to the radical
left. A contribution of $100, $75, or even just $25 ensures we
have the resources we need to win.

Will you help today?

WIN BACK THE HOUSE

Thank you,

Amy Ryan Courser
Conservative Republican for
Congress

DONATE

PAID FOR BY AMY RYAN COURSER FOR CONGRESS
This message was intended for dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like
to send this message to some of your friends, you can click here
to do so. You can also follow Amy Ryan Courser on Facebook,
Instagram or Twitter.

If you believe you received this
message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Amy
Ryan Courser click here to unsubscribe.

| | In just three short months, Peter, I've spoken to hundreds of Pennsylvanians, and while folks' policy priorities differ, everyone agrees on one thing: Establishment politicians are trying to play us. Again. **[We're doing things differently, building a campaign built on respect for voters and focused on working families. Contribute $7 now to join the team!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31597278/293142338/-34735242?refcode=2021-06-29-eoq&recurring=0&amount=7&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=2fe8eed7-e3d8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmU4ZWVkNy1lM2Q4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KBCaUC52rC0feGbnHMlzytCC44h-ahnqazc7Opsi8qk=)** This race is full up with people promising to pull us out of this hole while downplaying that they're the same career politicians who dug it in the first place (and who, coincidentally, make millions selling shovels). We're running against people who think that getting a bunch of likes on Twitter counts as leadership. We've got opponents who're so busy jockeying for favor with party bosses and big donors, they've forgotten how (and why) to talk to working Pennsylvanians. Those are yesterday's old tactics, Peter, and they won't work in November 2022. I know it, and you know it. Worst of all, they know it, too. In fact, here's the dirty secret: None o _f them think they can win._ **[We can win, Peter. We have to. Chip in now to make it happen!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31597279/293142339/-34735242?refcode=2021-06-29-eoq&recurring=0&amount=7&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=2fe8eed7-e3d8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmU4ZWVkNy1lM2Q4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KBCaUC52rC0feGbnHMlzytCC44h-ahnqazc7Opsi8qk=)** Even after the "leading" candidate raised millions of dollars, a cascade of other prominent elected officials jumped into this race. Why? Because they don't think **any** Democrat will win. And so they figure if Democrats are going to lose anyway, they might as well milk this race for some good publicity and name recognition. Well, I'm not willing to concede a Republican win in November '22. Six years is a long time and I won't risk putting Mitch McConnell in charge again. Working families cannot afford another round of more attacks on our health care, on basic civil liberties, on voting rights, on our environment. When I look at this race, I think about the lives and livelihoods at stake. Career politicians? All they see are poll numbers and donors and press clippings and the chance to scratch the right backs. This is a game to them. I got in this race to solve problems, not get famous. You have my promise, even when I am inside, I won't be an insider. I want to change this system because it is not working – not for my neighbors, my family, or the majority of working Pennsylvanians. We can take back this Senate seat, Peter – not for a political party, but for the people of this state. **[We're counting on supporters like you to get our message into every corner of this state and to grow our team of grassroots activists. Will you chip in $7 today to keep our movement strong?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31597280/293142340/-34735242?refcode=2021-06-29-eoq&recurring=0&amount=7&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=2fe8eed7-e3d8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmU4ZWVkNy1lM2Q4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KBCaUC52rC0feGbnHMlzytCC44h-ahnqazc7Opsi8qk=)** clean_body: | | | In just three short months, Peter, I've spoken to hundreds of Pennsylvanians, and while folks' policy priorities differ, everyone agrees on one thing: Establishment politicians are trying to play us. Again. = This race is full up with people promising to pull us out of this hole while downplaying that they're the same career politicians who dug it in the first place (and who, coincidentally, make millions selling shovels). We're running against people who think that getting a bunch of likes on Twitter counts as leadership. We've got opponents who're so busy jockeying for favor with party bosses and big donors, they've forgotten how (and why) to talk to working Pennsylvanians. Those are yesterday's old tactics, Peter, and they won't work in November 2022. I know it, and you know it. Worst of all, they know it, too. In fact, here's the dirty secret: None o f them think they can win. = Even after the "leading" candidate raised millions of dollars, a cascade of other prominent elected officials jumped into this race. Why? Because they don't think any Democrat will win. And so they figure if Democrats are going to lose anyway, they might as well milk this race for some good publicity and name recognition. Well, I'm not willing to concede a Republican win in November '22. Six years is a long time and I won't risk putting Mitch McConnell in charge again. Working families cannot afford another round of more attacks on our health care, on basic civil liberties, on voting rights, on our environment. When I look at this race, I think about the lives and livelihoods at stake. Career politicians? All they see are poll numbers and donors and press clippings and the chance to scratch the right backs. This is a game to them. I got in this race to solve problems, not get famous. You have my promise, even when I am inside, I won't be an insider. I want to change this system because it is not working – not for my neighbors, my family, or the majority of working Pennsylvanians. We can take back this Senate seat, Peter – not for a political party, but for the people of this state. = John Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | PAID FOR BY MCGUIGAN FOR PA ---|--- | This email was sent by McGuiganForPA P.O. Box 329 Phoenixville, PA 19460 United States Email is an important way for John McGuigan to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. name: Stewart Navarre
subject: I’ll be quick
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEWART NAVARRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter, we’re down to less than 48 hours before our very first public FEC filing deadline. It’s certainly nerve-wracking since it is our first one, but by all accounts we - thanks to folks like yourself - are finishing strong. And for that, I am grateful.
I decided to run for Congress because I am deeply concerned that folks have lost faith in America. I know our brightest days are ahead of us and that we will come back together as a country, but to do that, we will need to deliver real results for Virginians.
That means cleaning up our rivers and the Bay, expanding access to healthcare and broadband, and fixing our crumbling infrastructure.
We can do this, but we will need your help getting there.
Can I count on you to chip in $20 right now to get us over the top and show just how potent our grassroots movement is? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2106-q2-sn-eoq?refcode=210629-1-email&amount=20]
I do not like asking for money because I know how hard you work for it. I know we can flip this seat, so anything you are able to contribute can be given through this link here: secure.actblue.com/donate/2106-q2-sn-eoq [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2106-q2-sn-eoq?refcode=210629-1-email]
Thank you so much for all you do,
Stewart

name: MTG
subject: Deadline tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greene
body:
Dear Peter -- Tomorrow is one of the most critical fundraising
deadlines in my political career: the End-of-Quarter reports.

These reports are what Democrat operatives
and Fake News "journalists" comb through just to see how strong
my support is amongst the people.
They use these reports to allocate Democrat
resources amongst the most vulnerable Republicans in Congress.
They even deploy Democrats from across the
country to knock doors, make phone calls, write emails, and
spread Fake News on social media. . .
All in an effort to defeat me in 2022!
In fact, they're on pace to spend TENS OF
MILLIONS of dollars to take me out.
DEFEND MARJORIE TAYLOR GREENE - CHIP IN
17.76 BEFORE END-OF-QUARTER DEADLINE
They've even recruited Democrat National
Committee Super Delegate Wendy Davis to defeat me in 2022.

As you can see, I strongly need your help,
Peter.
You've stood with me before. I must ask you
to stand with me again right now by chipping in 17.76 to help
me DEFEAT THE DEMOCRATS.
Please hurry, the deadline is just midnight
tomorrow. . .
The bigger my campaign warchest, the bigger
chance I have to fend off Hillary Clinton's and Stacey Abrams'
Democrats.
I am fighting every single day to stop these
socialists in Congress who want to rip this country a part and
rebuild it into their socialist hellhole.
I will never stop fighting. I will never give
up. I will never back down.
Can I can count on you to chip in 17.76
right now?
Every single day, I'm fighting to hold the
radical Democrats in the DC Swamp accountable. My plan is simple!
Impeach Joe Biden.
Expel Maxine Waters.
Fire Fauci.
And because I refuse to back down and shut
up, Democrats have painted a big red target on my back. . ..
They are prepared to unleash MILLIONS of
dollars to take me out. Some political experts even expect
$15-$20 million spent against me. . .
And not just the Democrats.
The Never Trump Lincoln Project and the Liz
Cheney wing of the Republican party want me gone.

This is exactly why I must ask you to chip in
17.76 right now.
Help me fight back and take a stand. Let's
take back America and Defeat the Democrats!

-- Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

Paid for by Greene
for Congress

subject: We’re Behind!
body:
Tomorrow is the End of Quarter Deadline, and I just got out of a Finance Meeting where I found out we are running behind.
---
| | | | | | Friend,

Tomorrow is the End of Quarter Deadline. I just got out of a Finance Meeting where I found out that we are running behind.
I will have to submit a report to the Federal Election Commission (FEC) by the end of the day tomorrow and I need your help to catch up to our goal.
This deadline is important because it will show the Radical Left that their big tech and corporate media donors don't stand a chance with our conservative movement.
You can follow this link to pitch in: [https://secure.winred.com/katcammack/fundraising-update-we-are-behind ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-NTGD8ExRLam94hk-qSgmTq6t7el_hqZm_WG-mkf5aw0gdnK-tXxiJJ86g7RgIFjdO-mtGjsi1SXsbeb4E7Lp285R2s5vkT1RchcBhfyB59GY7MpmGOcNu1giBqSsoCyiqpVBqh_R3khjDzv6BkBiZrGnWD7aXwVXZ9DtMA8aSVmiVIrJVlC5qpILELp5YUSOyoKD-QLfPIpUNg1lxhWwg==&c=_VQa1b0wM4UQvl-lwXSWT9MafF7TvkXppWrT4ZzKdBXfW_q3pYnb6A==&ch=jSF7OHejfNEWxj7f-h1uRYkTnGZcUieZpxNikCKDUjgftk0rsymt5g==)
Americans are losing trust in the Biden Administration, and our numbers need to reflect that.
I'd be grateful for any contribution to help us finish June strong, even if it's just $5.
Thanks in advance for taking the time to help our America First Agenda.
Make your $5 contribution here: [https://secure.winred.com/katcammack/fundraising-update-we-are-behind?amount=5 ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-NTGD8ExRLam94hk-qSgmTq6t7el_hqZm_WG-mkf5aw0gdnK-tXxiJJ86g7RgIFj4aapP-_dqmqlCES-6Z8_xL0DrXt1le_-nVbOX09UPNMJgc1Tp0nyYVKYy_uVuI4fx86qx9R7h1tag8RkYQ86qVKMmH8ytVRAen0RAHLwqd9a2UU3iTmwWRibdNbtgib_ptOYxWhyfFkTdYdg8mR5GUY5wIHR7Olw&c=_VQa1b0wM4UQvl-lwXSWT9MafF7TvkXppWrT4ZzKdBXfW_q3pYnb6A==&ch=jSF7OHejfNEWxj7f-h1uRYkTnGZcUieZpxNikCKDUjgftk0rsymt5g==)

name: James Carville
subject: Stop Donald Trump, win Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/qLiWuvnFrpl-sEpOZywW4bpWeyIG_iefcPuNFvFZKwo=/_vLJAKmBYVmORT62A3qRsIPg5TW0nOKCWj_G3SyRaWg=)
---
Friend, **[In a moment, I 'm going to ask you to donate to my friend Terry McAuliffe's campaign to be Virginia's next Governor.](https://act.myngp.com/el/qLiWuvnFrpl-sEpOZywW4bpWeyIG_iefcPuNFvFZKwo=/_vLJAKmBYVmORT62A3qRsIPg5TW0nOKCWj_G3SyRaWg=)** But before I do, I want to explain to you why Virginia is 2021's most important race. The extreme Republican candidate running against Terry is Glenn Youngkin. Youngkin is a mega-millionaire who has Donald Trump's "full endorsement." It ain't a mystery why Trump is all geeked up about Youngkin. Election experts are saying Democrats could lose Virginia. If that happens, Republicans would get a huge surge of momentum going into the 2022 midterms. So it's this simple: If Glenn Youngkin wins, Donald Trump wins. Worse, Trumpism will be on the march again heading into a pivotal midterm for the future of our democracy. The good news is that Terry McAuliffe has what it takes to win. He's tough, experienced, and has bold plans for Virginia that every single Democrat should be over the moon to support. Terry can win, but he's going to need to build a historic grassroots team to pull it off. Youngkin has pledged spending up to $75 million of his own money to buy the Governor's office for him and Trump. So here's my ask: Let's work our hearts out to make sure Terry McAuliffe wins the 2021 Virginia governor's race. If we do that we put a stake in the heart of Trumpism once and for all. **[Will you donate to make sure Terry McAuliffe wins in Virginia? A Glenn Youngkin victory would be a disaster for the future of our country.](https://act.myngp.com/el/qLiWuvnFrpl-sEpOZywW4bpWeyIG_iefcPuNFvFZKwo=/_vLJAKmBYVmORT62A3qRsIPg5TW0nOKCWj_G3SyRaWg=)** Thanks, James Carville

| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/qLiWuvnFrpl-sEpOZywW4bpWeyIG_iefcPuNFvFZKwo=/_vLJAKmBYVmORT62A3qRsIPg5TW0nOKCWj_G3SyRaWg=) Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597
Richmond VA 23218 [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/qLiWuvnFrpl-sEpOZywW4bpWeyIG_iefcPuNFvFZKwo=/vW2ZbqXWliCFETwUa69GsR9s2pD4bAmBXeDI38CS9oE=) |

name: Lt. Col. Allen West (Ret.)
subject: The Tide Is Turning . . .
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by the Republican Party of Texas P
body:
The tide is turning. Texas just picked up TWO new congressional seats for the 2022 midterm elections. _And, along with Texas, reliably "red" states like Florida, North Carolina, and Montana also picked up a handful of seats._ [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57832335:6LThcDl0N:m:1:3253819041:CAE2B5FFCEE7C8FBF9B50F0EF2730BC0:r) In other words, we are within striking distance of taking back the House in 2022 and retiring Nancy Pelosi for good. **_[Will you contribute just $2 to the Republican Party of Texas today to help us win these two critical seats in the upcoming midterm election?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57832335:6LThcDl0N:m:1:3253819041:CAE2B5FFCEE7C8FBF9B50F0EF2730BC0:r)_** I know that it seems like bleak times for the conservative movement. But do not forget about what happened in 2020. Even with the highly dubious election procedures, Big Tech censorship, and tidal wave of fake news - Republicans came up just 5 seats short of taking back the House. Now, Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer, and their progressive socialist minions know that their time in power is fleeting. _That is why they have spent the last six months aggressively ramming their transformative socialist policies through Congress._ We must capitalize on the momentum we gained in 2020 by winning these two new seats and inspiring the rest of the nation to reject the socialist policies of Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, Nancy Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer. **_[And, that starts with your small gift of just $2 to the Republican Party of Texas today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57832335:6LThcDl0N:m:1:3253819041:CAE2B5FFCEE7C8FBF9B50F0EF2730BC0:r)_** Your contribution of just $2 or more today comes at a critical time. There are only a few days left in the 2nd fundraising quarter of the year, and we **_must_** keep up with the massive Democrat fundraising machine pouring millions of dollars into these new congressional districts. Your gift today will give us the resources needed to recruit, train, and elect strong conservatives who will _fight_ and _win_ to advance our conservative, America-first values. **_[That is why I am asking you to send a contribution of $2 or more right away.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57832335:6LThcDl0N:m:1:3253819041:CAE2B5FFCEE7C8FBF9B50F0EF2730BC0:r)_** I am counting on you and patriots from across America to help us retire Nancy Pelosi and take back control of the House of Representatives once and for all. Thank you in advance for your timely support. Steadfast and Loyal, Lt. Col. Allen West (Ret.) Chairman, Republican Party of Texas **#WeAreTheStorm**
* * *

name: Hakeem Jeffries
subject: I knew her when...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jahana Hayes
body:
I knew Jahana when she was a first-time candidate, running to make history in Connecticut’s 5th District. I joined her on that first campaign, rallying supporters to get out the vote in the 2018 race for Congress. When she won, I knew that the 5th District had just gained an unparalleled advocate. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31601829/293161400/-1295403277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWJlYzdlMy1lZWQ4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H94dp6AUvlaj-PLEtCBlcDtE4uIQmO1zmy8PJFH8IZs=&emci=d58e75ed-ebd8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=1ebec7e3-eed8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15529135) | I am always so proud to say “ _I knew her when...._ ” I knew Jahana when she was a first-time candidate, running to make history in Connecticut’s 5th District. I joined her on that first campaign, rallying supporters to get out the vote in the 2018 race for Congress. When she won, I knew that the 5th District had just gained an unparalleled advocate. **She has proven my initial instinct correct time and time again over these past 3 years. That is why it is essential that we re-elect Jahana to a third term and keep her voice in Congress.** [**I am asking you to donate today, before Jahana’s end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. | | Did you see this message from Tom’s dad Steve?

Tom has _always_ been dedicated to bettering the lives of the people around him, and this will continue to be a priority in the U.S. Senate. We know we can count on him to fight for all Wisconsinites, not just the rich and connected.

[We know Tom is the right person to represent us in the Senate. Chip in now to help us raise the last $19,724 needed to make this happen >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31601843/293161583/745679173?refcode=TN_EM_FR_6MO_210629_1_6&refcode2=1fbec7e3-eed8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmJlYzdlMy1lZWQ4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HMKXZDJaypUYiindsAOEjGaSJqeMtdxWgkKlrZGpOGI=) | | **[Chip in Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31601844/293161590/745679173?refcode=TN_EM_FR_6MO_210629_1_6&refcode2=1fbec7e3-eed8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmJlYzdlMy1lZWQ4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HMKXZDJaypUYiindsAOEjGaSJqeMtdxWgkKlrZGpOGI=)**

* * *
**— _Begin Forwarded Message_ —**

**Hi, friend, my name is Steve Nelson, Thomas’ father.**

In 1980 when Thomas was four years old he built a speaker’s stand out of a large cardboard box. Seeing it, I thought to myself, “Hmm...maybe he’s planning on being a preacher like his Dad.” But no, he had just watched the 1980 debate between Jimmy Carter and Ronald Reagan, and he was inspired.

Thomas’ activism continued into high school. He and his buddy Bill organized a College Democrats chapter at Little Chute High School. He can tell you what he did at Carleton College and Princeton. But I can tell you his heart has always been for the farmers and millworkers who surrounded him in his youth. He is modern in every way, but still an old soul at his core.

Thomas has the same passion for fairness that I do; the same disgust for those who take advantage of the vulnerable. If you want someone to cover your back, he’s your man. He is tenacious. He knows how to channel his temper and tell the truth. He’s not a Preacher’s Kid for nothing!

And yet, he has a wonderful sense of humor, as you see in his ads and Instagram. Always has time for his kids and family. Keeps track of all his cousins and elders. Loves to laugh, fish, watch sports, and make time for it all.

[Now, let me get to the point. Thomas’ campaign has a big deadline coming up on Wednesday. Only if you’re able, can you chip in to support his campaign? Any amount would go a long way.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31601846/293161595/745679173?refcode=TN_EM_FR_6MO_210629_1_6&refcode2=1fbec7e3-eed8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmJlYzdlMy1lZWQ4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HMKXZDJaypUYiindsAOEjGaSJqeMtdxWgkKlrZGpOGI=) | **[Chip in Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31601847/293161608/745679173?refcode=TN_EM_FR_6MO_210629_1_6&refcode2=1fbec7e3-eed8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmJlYzdlMy1lZWQ4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HMKXZDJaypUYiindsAOEjGaSJqeMtdxWgkKlrZGpOGI=)**

P.S. in a future email, I’ll tell you what his grandmother said about him...

Peace!

Sincerely,

Steve, Dad, and if you read my diploma, The Rev. Dr. Steven M. Nelson

Tom has always been dedicated to bettering the lives of the people around him, and this will continue to be a priority in the U.S. Senate. We know we can count on him to fight for all Wisconsinites, not just the rich and connected. = | | = — Begin Forwarded Message — Hi, friend, my name is Steve Nelson, Thomas’ father. In 1980 when Thomas was four years old he built a speaker’s stand out of a large cardboard box. Seeing it, I thought to myself, “Hmm...maybe he’s planning on being a preacher like his Dad.” But no, he had just watched the 1980 debate between Jimmy Carter and Ronald Reagan, and he was inspired. Thomas’ activism continued into high school. He and his buddy Bill organized a College Democrats chapter at Little Chute High School. He can tell you what he did at Carleton College and Princeton. But I can tell you his heart has always been for the farmers and millworkers who surrounded him in his youth. He is modern in every way, but still an old soul at his core. Thomas has the same passion for fairness that I do; the same disgust for those who take advantage of the vulnerable. If you want someone to cover your back, he’s your man. He is tenacious. He knows how to channel his temper and tell the truth. He’s not a Preacher’s Kid for nothing! And yet, he has a wonderful sense of humor, as you see in his ads and Instagram. Always has time for his kids and family. Keeps track of all his cousins and elders. Loves to laugh, fish, watch sports, and make time for it all. = | = P.S. in a future email, I’ll tell you what his grandmother said about him... Peace! Sincerely, Steve, Dad, and if you read my diploma, The Rev. Dr. Steven M. Nelson | | | | = Tom Nelson serves as County Executive for Outagamie, one of the worst-hit COVID areas in the nation. Local officials have been leading our country through the pandemic because Donald Trump and Ron Johnson have failed. Tom is running for U.S. Senate because we need real leaders in Washington who will take COVID seriously. And if we can take on a pandemic, we can take on anything. And if you can win in a red county six times, you can win anywhere. If you’d like to unsubscribe, = Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin ** Nelson for Wisconsin PO Box 361 Kaukauna, WI 54130 United States**

body:
BIG news, Peter: **EMILY's List has officially endorsed our campaign to take on Ron Johnson!**

Every day our momentum grows stronger, and I'm so excited to have EMILY's List on board — an incredible organization with a proven record of backing winning pro-choice Democratic women across the country! Their endorsement is proof that our grassroots campaign is catching people's attention.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31602318/293163218/-521710702?gpsid=50_130_19576&refcode=em21_210629_ELList_fnd_gq_act__SG_ettx_sl2&utm_campaign=em21_210629_ELList_fnd_gq_act__SG_ettx_sl2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODgwNWQyNC1mMGQ4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LCnbB7aPkbxgQR6uRImr96u67Iym4AZyWh0Q3LyZEt8=)
If you don't know what the acronym in EMILY's List stands for, I'll tell you: **Early Money is Like Yeast.** It's the key ingredient for women candidates to get the lift they need to compete on a level playing field. That's why this endorsement couldn't have come at a better time, and I'd be honored to have your support right now, too.

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
Peter,
We have until midnight tomorrow night to meet our end-of-quarter goal and I’m hoping the TNDP can count on your support. As you know, we’ve been making a lot of changes recently. We’ve ramped up our infrastructure and are continuing to put systems in place that will allow us to do the hard work required to build back blue in Tennessee.
Will you make a donation right now, and help us raise the $9,430 we need to meet our goal? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
I’m asking again because Bill Lee’s leadership alongside his seditionist GOP allies has been a disaster for our state. While countless Tennesseans were, and still are, suffering in the wake of COVID, Lee refused federal aid, made a mockery of masks, and instead focused on extreme alt-right legislation that would only take our state backwards.
That is why it is critical that the TNDP defeats him, and why I am asking for your help. All of the resources we raise go towards our efforts to chip away at the Republican supermajority. Will you help nudge us towards our end-of-quarter goal by making a donation right now? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
Thank you,
Hendrell Remus
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
P.S. Please, only donate if you can afford to. The impacts of this pandemic are real, and we completely understand if times are tough right now.
PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, CAROL V. ABNEY, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE.

#

**June end-of-quarter**
Deadline: 6/30
Goal: $50,000
Suggested donation: $5
We are emailing to ask you to make a contribution to support Mondaire’s re-election campaign. Please allow us to explain why this request is so important.
In order to marshal the resources we need to re-elect Mondaire, we need to hit our goals along the way. FEC end-of-quarter deadlines are especially important, because we are required to report the amount of money we raise for everyone — especially potential challengers — to see.
**That’s why we set a goal of raising $50,000 before midnight on June 30th. But we won’t be able to hit that number without lots and lots of donations from supporters like you pitching in whatever you can.**
So we have to ask:
[**Can you rush in $3 to help us raise $50,000 before the end of the day on June 30th? # [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210629-1870-header&t=1&akid=1870%2E434096%2EFO6WeI)
True story, Peter: **I legitimately won my first election by a *single* vote.**
I’ll tell you the whole story, but first I’m wondering if there’s any chance you could [**_please make your very first $5 donation to help our campaign raise $100,000 before the end-of-quarter FEC deadline tomorrow at midnight?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21363?refcode=em20210629-1870&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=1870%2E434096%2EFO6WeI)
Serving as Mayor of Braddock, Pennsylvania for 15 years was the greatest honor of my life. But the truth is that it almost didn’t happen at all.
Back in May 2005, the Democratic primary for Mayor of Braddock was locked in a dead heat. Winning the primary meant everything, because no other candidates were on the November ballot. **Whoever won the primary became the next mayor.**
Unfortunately, Election Day didn't bring a clear winner. The unofficial results showed a tie for the mayoral nomination between me and one other opponent. The absentee ballots had all been counted, but the write-ins were still outstanding. So we went into a recount.
It was a month before the results were finally certified. **In the end, it all came down to *three* provisional ballots cast in Braddock’s 2nd Ward.**
The first ballot was rejected because the voter wasn't registered. The second ballot only counted for countywide races, because the voter wasn't registered in Braddock.
But the third voter _was_ registered in Braddock — and ultimately,**they cast the single deciding vote that elected me Mayor of Braddock.** The joke I never get tired of is that I voted for myself. 😂 Here’s the actual headline in the _Pittsburgh Post-Gazette_ from 16 years ago:
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21363?refcode=em20210629-1870&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fjf-email-20210629-1%3Frefcode%3Dem20210629-1870&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=1870%2E434096%2EFO6WeI)
Peter, I’m telling you this story ~24 hours away from our end-of-quarter FEC deadline to show you just how critical reaching _every single voter_ in this Democratic primary for U.S. Senate is. **I may have won my first election by a *single* vote, but we can’t afford to lose the Pennsylvania Senate seat by a *single* vote.**
In order to reach every voter in all 67 Pennsylvania counties in the coming weeks, though, we absolutely must raise $100,000 online through emails like this one before tomorrow at midnight. That’s why I am humbly asking:
[**_Can you please make your *first-ever* $5 donation to help our campaign raise $100,000 before the FEC deadline tomorrow, June 30?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21363?refcode=em20210629-1870&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=1870%2E434096%2EFO6WeI)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21363?refcode=em20210629-1870&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=1870%2E434096%2EFO6WeI)**
From me, Gisele, and our entire family, thank you so much for supporting our campaign.
— John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
P.S. If you haven’t already heard, me + Gisele are calling a list of online donors this week to say Thank You for donating before our _huuuuuuge_ end-of-quarter FEC deadline tomorrow at midnight. [**_It’s the least we can do if you chip in for the first time before Wednesday, June 30._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21363?refcode=em20210629-1870&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=1870%2E434096%2EFO6WeI)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210629-1870-footer&t=25&refcode2=1870_434096_FO6WeI&akid=1870%2E434096%2EFO6WeI)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=26&akid=1870%2E434096%2EFO6WeI)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=1870%2E434096%2EFO6WeI)

**Government For The People?**
Dear Friend,
You know I’ve always been about making government transparent.

Government is supposed to be by the people, for the people.

Lately, it feels like anything but.

Take the recent UFO sightings. I don’t believe the U.S. government is telling us the full story.

**What else are they keeping from us?**

Just a few weeks ago, migrant children were flown into Tennessee in the middle of the night, and we STILL don’t have answers.

I’m tired of government bureaucrats thinking they’re better than us regular folks.

But if I’m going to keep asking questions and butting heads with DC, I’m going to make some enemies. And I’ll need some help standing up to them.

**We set a $10,400 fundraising goal for the month of June, but we’re still $5,380 away from meeting it. Reaching our goal will give us the resources to push for answers. **

name: Pramila Jayapal HQ
subject: You can’t miss this, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Pramila could be calling.
#
Peter, we wanted to make sure you didn’t miss Pramila’s email from Sunday.
**Pramila will be personally calling a few grassroots donors after the FEC deadline, so make sure to chip in by 11:59pm tomorrow night! Make your contribution right now:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pramila-fec-21q2-dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4107?refcode=em20210629-417-dpwillis67@gmail.com&amount=3&t=1&akid=417%2E420207%2E7qdJ1_)**
\- Team Jayapal
\----Forwarded Message----
From: Pramila Jayapal
Date: June 27, 2021
Subject: Peter, can I give you a call?
Peter, this Wednesday marks an important end-of-quarter deadline for our campaign.
At the end of every quarter, our campaign has to file a mandatory fundraising report with the Federal Elections Commission (FEC). It probably comes as no surprise, but the total amount you raise, and the specific amount of individual people who donate to you, is a huge indicator of our strength — and what we can accomplish in the weeks ahead.
_It’s vital that we hit our goal — not only to prove that the state of our movement is strong but also to fuel our organizing for transformative change across this country._ **So as a way of saying thank you for chipping in ahead of this crucial deadline, I’m going to personally call a few grassroots supporters who help us get over the finish line.**
[**Peter, will you chip in $3 or any amount to help us reach our $150,000 FEC deadline goal before Wednesday night? If you do, you might just get a call from me as a special way of saying thank you.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4107?refcode=em20210629-417&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=417%2E420207%2E7qdJ1_)
**[Chip in $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4107?refcode=em20210629-417&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=417%2E420207%2E7qdJ1_)**
Because our campaign doesn’t take a dime from corporate interests, we rely entirely on grassroots supporters like you. In fact, a sizable chunk of our fundraising comes from emails just like this one, from people like YOU.
That’s exactly why it’s so important to set aside this time to connect. And we can talk about whatever you want — our fight to end the filibuster, a wealth tax, Medicare for All, or perhaps even sharing funny stories about our pets! But most importantly, I’ll be sure to personally thank you for your generous contribution.
[**If you’d like to hear from me, chip in toward our $150,000 FEC deadline goal before midnight Wednesday and you could be one of the supporters I call. Be sure to include a number I can reach you at, turn your ringer on, and you just might hear from me.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4107?refcode=em20210629-417&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=417%2E420207%2E7qdJ1_)
Hope to talk to you soon,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210629-417-footer&t=24&refcode2=417_420207_7qdJ1_&akid=417%2E420207%2E7qdJ1_)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=25&akid=417%2E420207%2E7qdJ1_)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=417%2E420207%2E7qdJ1_)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Marissa Tully
subject: FWD: RE: Can you ask our team if they’ve donated?
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Friend—

See below. Nikki specifically asked us to reach out to you directly, friend. You’ve always been one of our top supporters, and we need your help more than ever.

Our Wednesday deadline is a critical test of our campaign, but we’re still $18,073 short of meeting our goal.

Team, Nikki is counting on your support. Please click here to chip in $5 immediately and help us close the gap. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/enfeom?refcode=tuesday]

Thanks,
Marissa
Deputy Finance Director

--Begin Forwarded Message--
From: Stefanie Sass
To: Nikki Fried, Marissa Tully
Subject: RE: Can you ask our team if they’ve donated?
Date: Tuesday, June 29th, 2021 at 8:03:09 AM

Sure thing! I know our team has always stepped up when we need it most, so I think it’s a great idea to ask.

I’m looping in Marissa who can email our top supporters directly to ask for their help. Thanks!

On Tuesday, June 29th, 2021 at 7:59:08 AM, Nikki Fried wrote:

Stefanie--

Can you ask our team if they’ve donated yet this month? I know they’re supporting our campaign, and I think they’d be willing to step up before the deadline.

Please reach out to our top supporters in advance of the deadline. Even if they have already chipped in, another donation could make a big difference.

Thanks for all you’re doing in advance of our end-of-month goal.

Thanks!

Nikki

name: Fmr. Congressman Tom Tancredo
subject: A Message from Fmr. Congressman Tom Tancredo
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Laurel Imer for Congress
body:
Fellow Coloradan, I hope this email finds you well.
---
| | | | | | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| June 29th
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,
I am writing you today to ask for your help.
As you may have seen, the preliminary redistricting lines in Colorado were released last week. So now we must fight more than ever to take back Colorado and the US House in 2022.
As you might also know, tomorrow is June 30th and that means there will be another FEC mandated, Quarterly Fundraising Deadline.
My long-time friend, Laurel Imer needs your help to reach her fundraising goal. Laurel and I have worked together in Colorado for over 10 years. Whether it was on the T-Party, my campaigns, or We Build the Wall, Laurel has always been there to support me.
So now it is time for all of us to be there to support her.
Ed Perlmutter has been in Congress for far too long and it is my belief that Laurel is the right candidate to take him on in the 2022 election. Laurel is a Trump Supporter to the core and has always been laser-focused on Conservative values and principles.
Laurel is running to Put America First, and she can't do that with your financial support today. With less than 48 hours remaining, time is running out and she needs to reach her goal.

---

I was proud to endorse Laurel the day that she announced for CD7 and I will never waver in my support for her. When I endorsed Laurel, I said the following:
"I am proud to endorse and support Laurel Imer as she takes on the massive challenge of running for Congress in CD7. You give us hope and You have my full support!"
My hope now, is that you will help Laurel continue in the fight to Save America and Put America First.
Sincerely,

name: NH GOP
subject: Join us for a night at LaBelle Winery with RNC Co-Chair Tommy Hicks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
On Saturday July, 17th at 6:00pm the NHGOP will be hosting an event at LaBelle Winery in Amherst
[](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fevents.nh.gop%2Fevent%2Fnight-at-the-winery-with-rnc-co-chair-tommy-hicks%2F/1/0100017a58051be3-cc21fad3-3dbf-41f6-87c0-4d1a969c27ea-000000/4dPSTkbNX1TEDUkDM71lBs9rmgs=224)
Derek,

On Saturday, July, 17th at 6:00pm, the NH GOP will be hosting a Night at the Winery _with RNC Co-Chair Tommy Hicks_ at LaBelle Winery in Amherst, NH.
This exclusive event is a great opportunity to hear from one of the leaders of the Republican Party, and network with like-minded New Hampshire conservatives.
Tickets are extremely limited; _this event will sell out_.
[](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fevents.nh.gop%2Fevent%2Fnight-at-the-winery-with-rnc-co-chair-tommy-hicks%2F/2/0100017a58051be3-cc21fad3-3dbf-41f6-87c0-4d1a969c27ea-000000/155zrWJztWeKgg9N42rnPzXPh1c=224)

Tickets and sponsorships are available. Details can be found on the event page at the link below, or contact DJ@nhgop.org for more information.
We are extremely excited to be hosting Mr. Hicks for this exclusive event.
We hope that you will be able to join us!

[Reserve your Tickets Today](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fevents.nh.gop%2Fevent%2Fnight-at-the-winery-with-rnc-co-chair-tommy-hicks%2F/3/0100017a58051be3-cc21fad3-3dbf-41f6-87c0-4d1a969c27ea-000000/J-uY5YI89RFhxYgEb-mqOIO5w6c=224)

name: Gov. Roy Cooper
subject: Peter, Democrats could lose.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina

There are just a few months to win this race. |

Terry McAuliffe, our Democratic nominee and a former Virginia governor, is going up against a Trump-endorsed, multi-millionaire conservative who’s already spending $2 million on radio and TV to boost his profile — even though the election is still four months away. **Terry’s opponent has pledged to spend $75 million overall, including millions of his own money, to win this race.** This is unprecedented, Peter, and Terry needs our help to take on his opponent and the Republican big-money machine. At the end of this month, Terry’s campaign has to file an official end-of-quarter fundraising report — that means everyone will be able to see what they’ve raised so far and if they’ll have the funds to compete in the most expensive gubernatorial election Virginia has ever seen. [**This is make or break. Issues like voting rights, health care, and the environment are no less pressing now than they were when Joe Biden and Kamala Harris won the White House and when North Carolinians chose to re-elect our administration. **And we have to make sure Virginia’s voters understand that.**

Peter,

Kamala Harris is trying to get us to believe that Biden’s Border Crisis isn’t really a crisis at all and that things are just peachy down at our southern border.

But we know better than to believe her lies, especially since she REFUSED to visit the border and size up the situation for three full months after being put in charge.

Here’s a look at what the VP isn’t telling us about the situation at our border:
* _Fentanyl seizures have tripled since this time last year._
* _The number of migrants flooding into the country reached a 20-year high last month._
* _The government is renting out entire hotels to have a place to put all those people, using our tax dollars to foot the bill._
* _Coyotes are making a fortune smuggling drugs and people across our lax border._

**The Left’s free-for-all open border policies are putting our communities and our economy at risk, and it will only get worse the longer Kamala continues to turn a blind eye and lie about the scope of the crisis. It’s about time our leaders in Washington do something about it.**

Harold Earls knows this crisis isn’t just a problem for border communities, it’s impacting families all across America. That’s why he’s on a mission to end Biden’s Border Crisis once he makes it to Congress.

**And Peter, YOU can help him get there.**

[**Chip in and help send Harold to Congress so he can crack down on the Left’s dangerous open border policies. >>>**](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=cdea134a63ca41e79e984fbea0a3a956&_e=uB76MUFbo3ntt4e-d0S5RrfKrqnfHSRBTig8px5LRxNwyWuUl0-Q-nK07q-9Jnuyk-uWR0gdR_Gn9mQv-jUYFzsYm5psGhIff85CEr41PZJ0a0gUE0uVmS4-qfmJwcLLak1izP_yk9c1VKKf-jFuarypDIBFNIYmTa7x9BsEdjmp3Au7prEIwVWi9mUCGexK8UbF50fOYES5-ooJoO4dNTy1y4AJYSs25b3jxGRws2K399TwQBUILp7AQo4NVTgJmR2C1f0Yg0PrGVS3wMjMa0OEIMSjdipO1UO8UDKcLESjvnYakFCsbmwzasPF5kfqQTwn-FhaKsfL8vXs9lGw-ElWsGjkcARHlMsc6TDuTX341Mm8aWxaCHd0qS07vH-brdcB1hqvAwM1hZ5BSxIJhQcveJzA1ls6X3OE_HEeBa4XBu685GHtlyphJhfBSREctzWtSP5E11mArjd24uU-_WwNpi64BQymlVJl0r2f0dr2seCY7jFD8teLNk-oFxj2)

clean_body: Kamala Harris is turning a blind eye instead of doing her job and fixing the border crisis. | | The Left’s free-for-all open border policies are putting our safety and our economy at risk. | | | | Peter, Kamala Harris is trying to get us to believe that Biden’s Border Crisis isn’t really a crisis at all and that things are just peachy down at our southern border. But we know better than to believe her lies, especially since she REFUSED to visit the border and size up the situation for three full months after being put in charge. Here’s a look at what the VP isn’t telling us about the situation at our border: Fentanyl seizures have tripled since this time last year. The number of migrants flooding into the country reached a 20-year high last month. The government is renting out entire hotels to have a place to put all those people, using our tax dollars to foot the bill. Coyotes are making a fortune smuggling drugs and people across our lax border. The Left’s free-for-all open border policies are putting our communities and our economy at risk, and it will only get worse the longer Kamala continues to turn a blind eye and lie about the scope of the crisis. It’s about time our leaders in Washington do something about it. Harold Earls knows this crisis isn’t just a problem for border communities, it’s impacting families all across America. name: Team Malcolm
subject: we made a difficult decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
If things don't pick up before midnight tomorrow, we will have a big gap in our budget going into Q3.
#

Team, it’s Vanessa, Malcolm’s campaign manager.
I made a very difficult decision during our budget meeting yesterday.
It became clear that in order for us to continue building our coalition of working folks who support our progressive agenda, we need to invest a bit more money in our digital ads.
**We don't have that money in the budget, but I said OK. I gave the expense the green light.**
Now, this is a huge risk, especially since we're still a good chunk behind on our FEC goal.
If things don't pick up before midnight tomorrow, we will have a big gap in our budget going into Q3.
**But, honestly, I made a bet that, if I asked, you would come through to help fill that gap. And I’m really hoping you will. For Malcolm. For the working families depending on us to fight for them.**
[Can you make a $3 contribution to hit our fundraising goal before our FEC deadline and fill the gap in our budget?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31613287/293204944/-347207331?refcode2=787dc0e5-07d9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210629-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODdkYzBlNS0wN2Q5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FOEnZ8zJekb3QuSEOssa53QH2xakVV_-Rf7mqJjlmZ0=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31613288/293204945/-347207331?refcode2=787dc0e5-07d9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210629-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODdkYzBlNS0wN2Q5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FOEnZ8zJekb3QuSEOssa53QH2xakVV_-Rf7mqJjlmZ0=)**
As I said, it was a tough choice, but I made it knowing this incredible team has always had Malcolm's back.
Thanks to your support, we're leading the fight for a government that actually works for working people like us. I appreciate everything you do.
In solidarity,
Vanessa Clifford
Campaign Manager
Malcolm Kenyatta for Senate

* * *

**Republicans plot to unseat 47 Democrats** **[Peter, this is bad. Kevin McCarthy and his Republicans just hatched up a plan to retake the House. Our Democratic Majority has never been more vulnerable, but grassroots donations have been at a standstill. To overcome this gross Republican plot, we need $15,000 before our End of Quarter Deadline. Will you rush in $3 now? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31613420/293205601/549626075?amount=3&refcode=TCFC_20210629_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTE2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Yzc1ZWUwNS0wOGQ5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ReRGKDnuOqUGEKAcur-8NzJUbEIy-blIfpj3qKwI5f0=)**

Peter, we need you to make a CHOICE:

\-- Will you sit back as Kevin McCarthy and all of his MAGA Republicans take our hard-won Majority from us -- and all the progress we’ve fought for with it?

\-- OR will you help us mobilize in this critical moment and support the Democrats who desperately need our help?

| Friend,

New Hampshire voters are ready to send Maggie Hassan a **STRONG** message next November over her **SUPPORT** for the radical left's "For the People Act," HR1 / S1. This bill is an assault on our Democracy disguised as a "voting rights bill."

Provisions in the bill include:
* **FEDERALIZING** elections, stripping away New Hampshire's right to run their own free and fair elections.

* **INVALIDATES** any state law that requires voter I.D. in order to vote.

* **CREATES** a slush fund that redirects taxpayer money to political campaigns (_yes, you read that correctly ..._)

* **PERMANENTLY** establishes federal vote-by-mail procedures from 2020 that increases the likelihood of voter fraud.

* **JEOPARDIZES** our First-In-The-Nation Presidential Primary.

New Hampshire's Democrat Secretary of State Bill Gardner said that **Nancy Pelosi is using HR1 to make New Hampshire and the rest of the country like her state of California** by rendering articles of our own state constitution null and void.

LFOD PAC ("_Live Free or Die_ " PAC) wants to not only be a voice for you, but _actually listen to your concerns and work for you_. That is why we need your help to **FLIP** New Hampshire **RED** in 2022 by defeating Hassan and other radical New Hampshire Democrats like Chris Pappas.

name: And my own fundraising is down by more than 50%. I really need your help to get my campaign in order
subject: Am I still on your radar?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
With Republicans only needing to flip FIVE SEATS to win back control of the House, they're already identifying potential top races to invest in | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58344777:W3xBS7d_N:m:1:2247059263:C16CA947B8C98EA014222D6B70DFC74F:r)
---
Peter,

I know you have better things to be doing than reading about a congressional race a full 1.5 years before Election Day, but for me, **talking, writing, and emailing about this race is currently my life.** It's all consuming, and I wouldn't have it any other way.

Last year, I came within 5 percentage points of defeating one of the most entrenched Democrats in Congress. And quite frankly, it was because of conservatives like YOU. The kind words of encouragement helped get us through campaigning during a pandemic; **[the generous donations enabled us to outspend my opponent and attract the support from the national Republican Party.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58344777:W3xBS7d_N:m:1:2247059263:C16CA947B8C98EA014222D6B70DFC74F:r)**

The NRCC (National Republican Campaign Committee) has their eyes on me once again. With Republicans only needing to flip FIVE SEATS to win back control of the House, they're already identifying potential top races to invest in. **My race in Oregon's 4th District is one they're looking at seriously.**

**But as I've written to you before, I have to prove that I can raise $100,000 online before they'll formally begin to advise and invest in my campaign.**

**We've set an internal deadline of reaching this goal by midnight on June 30th - JUST 24 hours NOW.** **[We're currently sitting at 95% of our goal raised, and we need your IMMEDIATE HELP to make sure that the last 5% doesn't elude us.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58344777:W3xBS7d_N:m:1:2247059263:C16CA947B8C98EA014222D6B70DFC74F:r)**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58344777:W3xBS7d_N:m:1:2247059263:C16CA947B8C98EA014222D6B70DFC74F:r)
I'm running again because I know that with a full year and a half of campaigning - introducing myself to voters I couldn't last time due to COVID-19 restrictions - **we will take out Peter DeFazio and with our victory help deliver the House a Republican majority.**

Thanks for your help. **[Any amount helps.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58344777:W3xBS7d_N:m:1:2247059263:C16CA947B8C98EA014222D6B70DFC74F:r)**

Respectfully,

Alek Skarlatos
Republican for Congress

[**DONATE TODAY -> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58344777:W3xBS7d_N:m:1:2247059263:C16CA947B8C98EA014222D6B70DFC74F:r)

| Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. subject: Is DeSantis breaking the law by protecting Trump?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, Manhattan DA Cyrus Vance has been leading an investigation into Trump, and according to officials, there is enough evidence to convict him. **But Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis is giving Donald Trump a get out of jail free card.** DeSantis has said that he will use a loophole in Florida law to protect Trump from extradition if he's indicted in Vance's investigation or a separate investigation by New York Attorney General, Tish James. It's beyond clear that the GOP will never let Trump face the consequences of his criminal behavior, even though he has already incited an insurrection. Trump will just go back to hiding in Mar-a-Lago if Vance and James don't act now to indict him while he's touring the country. We want to show New York investigators that the American people demand accountability. So, Peter, please tell us where you stand: **Should Donald Trump be indicted?** | **[YES](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31613540/293205841/787923590?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFhOWEwYTBjLTA4ZDktZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=tVgaO0duxkTJM8bObWIFO5MNn3YbT6w4SgilYRte-XU=&emci=778b9f59-f4d8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=1a9a0a0c-08d9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=5546903)** | | **[NO](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31613541/293205842/787923590?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFhOWEwYTBjLTA4ZDktZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=tVgaO0duxkTJM8bObWIFO5MNn3YbT6w4SgilYRte-XU=&emci=778b9f59-f4d8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=1a9a0a0c-08d9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=5546903)**

It’s almost here, friend. We only have one more day until our critical Texas Ethics Commission filing deadline comes to a close. We only get to report our first fundraising numbers once. We’re counting on _your_ help to make it clear to the press and to the whole state: we will defeat Dan Patrick. clean_body: | It’s almost here, friend. We only have one more day until our critical Texas Ethics Commission filing deadline comes to a close. We only get to report our first fundraising numbers once. We’re counting on your help to make it clear to the press and to the whole state: we will defeat Dan Patrick. Once our finance numbers go public, our team will crunch the numbers, and then Mike will take a close look at ‘em to see where we’re at (As a former auditor and businessman, he does not mess around with numbers). Mike needs to know that he’ll have a strong grassroots movement behind him if he officially enters the race. And this filing report could determine whether we have the resources and support to run a robust campaign against Dan Patrick in every Texas county to fight to earn every Texan’s vote. If you think Mike should take the fight to Dan Patrick, pitch in $5 or any amount today to show him you have his back. Can you make a contribution today before our critical TEC deadline expires tomorrow at midnight? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for believing in our vision for a better Texas. — Team Collier The Collier Committee P.O. Box 14648 Humble, TX 77347 United States | | Paid for by the Collier Committee

Hi there,
Mike Pence was in New Hampshire this month for a massive GOP fundraiser, and this quote really stuck with me. Here’s why:
Republicans only need to flip ONE seat to take back the majority, and Mike Pence made clear that they’re laser-focused on New Hampshire. The problem is that our public quarterly fundraising deadline is TOMORROW, but our online fundraising has taken a dip.
**[With Pence and the GOP fully invested in this race, that’s really bad news. Will you please rush $5 or more right now to help make up ground?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31613868/293206817/1251890980?refcode=e20210629_pence-eoq&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YWQ3ZWY2Yy0wOWQ5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RxE3dGlofe_hzsi_l2ewrba3WyNjy9ZKsOuYzLwrrlo=)**
Mitch McConnell, Mike Pence, and Donald Trump have a plan to flip the Senate. And, after losing this seat to me by just 1,017 votes in 2016, they’re pulling out all of the stops this time around.
We don’t need mega-donors like Republicans to win, but we do need people like you to give $5 or what you can right now -- before tomorrow’s deadline -- to show our strength.
**[Your support is so important to me, and I genuinely mean it when I say that I’m counting on your help. Will you please donate $5 or more to protect our vulnerable Senate seat -- and Democrats’ fragile majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31613874/293206821/1251890980?refcode=e20210629_pence-eoq&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YWQ3ZWY2Yy0wOWQ5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RxE3dGlofe_hzsi_l2ewrba3WyNjy9ZKsOuYzLwrrlo=)**

clean_body: | | | | | | == | Peter, As of today, we are less than 48 hours away from the end of the financial quarter, and we still need your support before this crucial deadline. With the entirety of Washington D.C. and the Establishment class against us, we NEED to have a strong report in order to fend off attacks. The stakes are higher than ever. Let us tell you why:

Talk of defunding and abolishing the police hasn't subsided. Violence still plagues our streets, and America is experiencing a generational **_CRIME WAVE_**...and _**Democrats have the nerve to blame the police.**_

Peter, you know no one will fight harder for the good name of our police than Andrew. _**It's why every New York City police union endorsed him.**_

Over the last year, we’ve seen brutal attacks on our police from Portland to New York City go unchecked while Washington radicals like AOC and the Squad embolden these mobs.

Our police are walking the streets every day, putting their lives in danger to defend us. Today, we've got to stand up for them.

Peter, that’s not good enough for our police forces.
