clean_body: Democrats blame the same Police they defunded for the recent crime wave... | | | Democrats blame the same police they defunded for the recent crime wave! - Hi Peter, The stakes are higher than ever. Let us tell you why: Talk of defunding and abolishing the police hasn't subsided. Violence still plagues our streets, and America is experiencing a generational CRIME WAVE...and Democrats have the nerve to blame the police. | We must send a message that this is unacceptable. Peter, you know no one will fight harder for the good name of our police than Andrew. It's why every New York City police union endorsed him. Over the last year, we’ve seen brutal attacks on our police from Portland to New York City go unchecked while Washington radicals like AOC and the Squad embolden these mobs. Our police are walking the streets every day, putting their lives in danger to defend us. Today, we've got to stand up for them. Peter, that’s not good enough for our police forces. Please, chip in anything you can to help Andrew continue fighting against this dangerous Defund the Police movement: | | Thank you, Team Garbarino | | | PAID FOR BY GARBARINO FOR CONGRESS | | P.O. Box 101, Bayport, NY 11705 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell, Giffords.org
subject: We’ve never been closer
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Hi there — my name is Debbie Mucarsel-Powell and I’m the new Senior Advisor at Giffords.
One of my responsibilities here at Giffords is helping to lead the fight to pass universal background checks — and I’m here to tell you today we’ve never been closer to getting this legislation signed into law.
As a former congresswoman, I served as the Vice-Chair of the Gun Violence Prevention Task Force and I worked tirelessly in the House to pass universal background checks in 2019. However, former Senate Majority Leader, Mitch McConnell left the Bipartisan Background Checks Act of 2019 untouched on his desk for almost two years.
So we’re doing everything we can to make sure that doesn’t happen again. We’ve calculated that we need to get 25,000 donations by Wednesday to give us the resources we need to push the Senate to bring background checks to the floor for a vote.
**So before I go, I have to ask:**
[**If you are able, will you make a $3 donation today to help us hit our 25,000 donation FEC fundraising goal? Your support, regardless of the amount, will go a long way towards helping us save lives.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-jun21?refcode=em210629-1-15&t=1&refcode2=284_3935704_mB9oKz&akid=284%2E3935704%2EmB9oKz)

This issue is personal to me. When I was 24 years old, my life was forever changed due to gun violence. My father didn’t have the chance to walk me down the aisle or meet my beautiful children, because his life was taken far too soon.
I don’t want another family to feel that pain, so I’m hoping that you can help us hit our fundraising goal to make sure we are able to do everything we can to get universal background checks signed into law. With your help, we can save more lives and make our communities safer.
All my best,
Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
Senior Advisor, Giffords

I’ve spent my life overturning expectations, bridging divides, and never accepting that what has been is how it always must be. I am an ordained minister who has organized for marriage equality all over the Deep South—and won. Together with my wife Meghann, I’m raising three kids in the heart of Western North Carolina, a community that I love and I know deserves better than our current representation.
I’ve heard “it’s too difficult” and “that just won’t work” many times over the years, and I know what it’s like to be counted out. And I know a lot of people across our region have heard the same message their whole lives.
**When I watched my Republican congressman, Madison Cawthorn, betray our democracy by helping to incite a violent mob on the morning of January 6th— _after previously trafficking in conspiracy theories and encouraging supporters to threaten elected officials_ —he showed the world he wasn’t fit to serve in Congress.**
I’m in this race because I know we can beat Madison Cawthorn; and we can do it the same way I’ve organized for change my whole life.
When I ran for County Commission, I was told over and over that I couldn’t win. But I did. Twice.
For the last four years I’ve served as a County Commissioner alongside three fellow Democrats and three Republicans. I’m proud to have worked with fellow Commissioners to find common ground and lead efforts to pass major pre-K funding and opioid addiction initiatives with 6-1 and 7-0 votes.
Madison Cawthorn believes that divisive rhetoric and empty promises are his path to power. He’s flirting with fascism and trying to take NC-11 with him.
**But that’s not who we are in Western North Carolina.** **And I know there’s another path.** A path that leads away from hateful rhetoric and fear-mongering and toward empathy, love, and respect. That’s why I’m building a campaign that’s focused not on trading blows with Madison Cawthorn—but instead on winning for the people of NC-11.
People want real results that improve their lives, and I have the experience running on pressing issues, winning against the odds, organizing everywhere and delivering for the people. _That’s how we’ll win this district._
_**I know we can get this done. But I’m also a realist and it’s going to take an enormous amount of resources to pull this off. **_
At every turning point in my life, people have told me “you can’t.” But I’ve never backed down when it comes to working for what’s right and just, and this race is no different. **This is a turning point for Western North Carolina, and I’m asking you to join me.**
[**We need 5,000 Founding Donors to chip in any amount to launch this grassroots campaign. Will you be one of them?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31615330/293212108/55940207?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_2103_FR_AnnouncementOnboard&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmYzMWUyZi0wZGQ5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IBcb96mQahsxuzrEcAXVbTTFnGTnb7TxL2lZb7G4eO0=)

And I know a lot of people across our region have heard the same message their whole lives. When I watched my Republican congressman, Madison Cawthorn, betray our democracy by helping to incite a violent mob on the morning of January 6th— after previously trafficking in conspiracy theories and encouraging supporters to threaten elected officials —he showed the world he wasn’t fit to serve in Congress. I’m in this race because I know we can beat Madison Cawthorn; and we can do it the same way I’ve organized for change my whole life. When I ran for County Commission, I was told over and over that I couldn’t win. But I did. Twice. For the last four years I’ve served as a County Commissioner alongside three fellow Democrats and three Republicans. I’m proud to have worked with fellow Commissioners to find common ground and lead efforts to pass major pre-K funding and opioid addiction initiatives with 6-1 and 7-0 votes. Madison Cawthorn believes that divisive rhetoric and empty promises are his path to power. He’s flirting with fascism and trying to take NC-11 with him. But that’s not who we are in Western North Carolina. And I know there’s another path. A path that leads away from hateful rhetoric and fear-mongering and toward empathy, love, and respect. That’s why I’m building a campaign that’s focused not on trading blows with Madison Cawthorn—but instead on winning for the people of NC-11. People want real results that improve their lives, and I have the experience running on pressing issues, winning against the odds, organizing everywhere and delivering for the people. That’s how we’ll win this district. I know we can get this done. But I’m also a realist and it’s going to take an enormous amount of resources to pull this off. At every turning point in my life, people have told me “you can’t.” But I’ve never backed down when it comes to working for what’s right and just, and this race is no different. This is a turning point for Western North Carolina, and I’m asking you to join me. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = = Jasmine Beach-Ferrara | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, . If you’d like to remove yourself from our list, please click . If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation. | | = | Paid for by Jasmine Beach-Ferrara for Congress Jasmine Beach-Ferrara for Congress PO Box 7553 Asheville, NC 28802 United States mailto:info@jasmineforcongress.com

name: Jayla Gilliam
subject: Update on a major campaign milestone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
I want to take a minute to share the good news with you.
#
Good morning, y'all!
**In 24 hours, we’ll hit a major campaign milestone** — our second FEC reporting deadline — and I’ve been busy crunching our ActBlue numbers, preparing to give Erica a fundraising update.
But I want to take a minute to share the good news: We’re just **73 contributions away from hitting our end-of-quarter goal.**
[**Can Erica count on you to make your first urgent $5 contribution to help close the gap before time runs out?**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/3524?refcode=em20210629-222&t=1&akid=222%2E3698%2EGtXThb)
**[Yes, I'll make a donation](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/3524?refcode=em20210629-222&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=222%2E3698%2EGtXThb)**
**I’ll be frank with you:** Erica doesn’t have the backing of the party establishment, and she doesn’t have a Rolodex of wealthy, well-connected donors — a lot of folks are counting us out because of that.
Our campaign is 100% people-powered. We’re scrappy. We’re unapologetic. And we’re beholden to the people, _not corporations or special interests._
**That means having your grassroots support is critical in proving to the naysayers that Erica is a viable candidate in this competitive race for the U.S. Senate.**
[**If you’re with Erica, will you please make an urgent $5 contribution to our campaign for U.S. Senate? By donating, you’re taking a personal stake in our unapologetic campaign as we head into the last 24 hours of the second end-of-quarter deadline.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/3524?refcode=em20210629-222&t=3&akid=222%2E3698%2EGtXThb)
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/3524?refcode=em20210629-222&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=222%2E3698%2EGtXThb)**
More soon,
Jayla
Jayla Gilliam
Finance Director
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210629-222-footer&t=23&refcode2=222_3698_GtXThb&akid=222%2E3698%2EGtXThb)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=24&akid=222%2E3698%2EGtXThb)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=222%2E3698%2EGtXThb)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

name: Alek Skarlatos
subject: Need you to watch this before tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
We've just over 24 hours to hit our second quarter goal. We're 95% of the way there, and your help could put us over the finish line. I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. |
---
I recorded a personal video for you, Peter.

Close but no cigar is not something that I want to say to my campaign staff Thursday morning if we come right up to our fundraising goal and miss it by a hair.

[](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=37f390bed8dd4a069d59c1bab3cb23dd&_e=CvnnhF1H1f3FM9tKjjfPndHlisD7QrSXsEd5aeJvmZqOweM0krfVtcOA0tcpqxIkIpZh_IlEp58sqa7p9UX_xMDiIgl-ddcwyfSVd3BT4K64sjszMEsCiwxqFL4DT5JUmoC4t1-swIUok1jCFrT95HMi1XmM3py2vV9rR7d_DwK3_TU2F7NLKACCja5lcoXy_QwPplejJiZ8aUu8M5ub4n0_cQgaBsNYAtWcJX8pahtqHVgCxQlyjpy3fvb7SX6NYjqyfQBgWr3hgCoonsnwBbArIdBUPmgt1e04w9CDoBEXS8GBfUXlsB5q9pjTe285qpLWtpI1OFUnSf7TihlbVHyoARv7oZvdx1czcTJDtejJr5JFSkJzNan_auVcjR7WMkKTkhAgXy5zSqxG4EPuspg_1d5Zdk56Z-RlHaSC46mikkbbUyTcYn_rsS2z3jn6)
I just looked at our donation dashboard and to hit our 2nd Quarter fundraising goal **(At this moment, we're running short by $4,380)** **[we’ll need 438 conservatives to make a donation of $10 or more before midnight to get us to where we need to be, so I’m asking: Can I count on you, Peter?](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=37f390bed8dd4a069d59c1bab3cb23dd&_e=CvnnhF1H1f3FM9tKjjfPndHlisD7QrSXsEd5aeJvmZqOweM0krfVtcOA0tcpqxIkIpZh_IlEp58sqa7p9UX_xMDiIgl-ddcwyfSVd3BT4K64sjszMEsCiwxqFL4DT5JUmoC4t1-swIUok1jCFrT95HMi1XmM3py2vV9rR7d_DwK3_TU2F7NLKACCja5lcoXy_QwPplejJiZ8aUu8M5ub4n0_cQgaBsNYAtWcJX8pahud_DUKSCCKhksN0wCc7xosR3GugvqfIqmpL0zJy0n1gOPnkR7vtUjb4l5iOLEKWqk-9OLPH_vfUZyEW49BB4gZfLHa_yPTsZ-aqJikCBXQkiE4TMOCwQHXJMuAaqCaa8ElpuYZBCAH679RXzd0QNNnKi07CcMWf6Tzt9E-EP7wN9jBltavRkfYZj4GEJmnzC8809X1x3r_GbccA4OP5Xzl)**

name: Laura Loomer
subject: CAIR is coming after me . . .
body:
I just had to sign a retainer agreement for five grand to defend myself in court against the Council on American-Islamic Relations (CAIR).

| | | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ZHwCDDRhOMFetmB9VVwSgg/lyM5eYQBWQoIBD763K892qhuQQ) | Patriot,

[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ZHwCDDRhOMFetmB9VVwSgg/lyM5eYQBWQoIBD763K892qhuQQ) I just had to sign a retainer agreement for five grand to defend myself in court against the Council on American-Islamic Relations (CAIR).

[**Will you help me cover this bill?**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ZHwCDDRhOMFetmB9VVwSgg/lyM5eYQBWQoIBD763K892qhuQQ)

CAIR operates in the United States despite being designated as a terrorist organization by the UEA for their ties to the Muslim Brotherhood and Hamas.

This group has been going after me for years because I speak the truth about their favorite politician, Ilhan Omar.

Remember when Omar referred to 9/11 as the day that “some people did something.”? Well Omar said that when she was the keynote speaker for CAIR at their gala event in 2019.

And CAIR is clearly not happy that I won’t stop calling them a terrorist organization – because they ARE!

I don’t anticipate this case against me making it too far, but the court has notified me that if I don’t hire an attorney, they’ll rule in CAIR’s favor (and I won’t represent myself).

This is an unforeseen bill and [**any amount you can donate will really help**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ZHwCDDRhOMFetmB9VVwSgg/lyM5eYQBWQoIBD763K892qhuQQ).

Thanks so much for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: I’m respectfully asking you to help my husband, Mark Kelly, knock his public FEC fundraising goal out of the park. Will you pitch in anything you can?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
I’m reaching out this month to ask you to support my husband, Mark Kelly, so he can hold his Senate seat in Arizona. Give me a chance to explain.
When Mark and I discussed him running for Senate, we knew it wasn’t going to be easy. We knew that outside groups would come out of the woodwork and spend untold amounts of money to attack Mark.
Well they did, and we still won, thanks to your help! But now, Mark has a new mission: _winning a full six-year term to the Senate._
And guess what? National Republicans are wasting no time spinning up the attack ads again. One Nation, a Mitch McConnell-backed Super PAC just dropped another $1 MILLION on ads attacking Mark.
**So Mark needs our help to fight off these attacks and the best way to do that is by reaching his 100,000 contribution goal by tomorrow at midnight. Mark is legally mandated to report his fundraising numbers so we can’t afford to fall short. What do you say, friend?**
[**If you are able, will you make a $3 donation to Mark’s people-powered campaign? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself because it’s going to take a lot of people chipping in a few bucks at a time to help reach our 100,000 contribution goal.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?refcode=em210629-1-15&t=1&refcode2=879_6688874_zEDlyp&akid=879%2E6688874%2EzEDlyp)

More often than not, the most difficult challenges we face require the help of others to overcome. Mark and I know that as well as anyone. He has always had my back. And when he needed you, you had his back as well.
Mark is going up against dark money groups who want to stop him from holding this seat in 2022. That’s why your support, no matter the amount, is greatly appreciated by me, Mark, and all of us on Team Kelly.
I can’t thank you enough for the amount of support you’ve shown so far — now let’s keep up the momentum!
All my best,
Gabby Giffords

Mark and I know that as well as anyone. He has always had my back. And when he needed you, you had his back as well. Mark is going up against dark money groups who want to stop him from holding this seat in 2022. That’s why your support, no matter the amount, is greatly appreciated by me, Mark, and all of us on Team Kelly. I can’t thank you enough for the amount of support you’ve shown so far — now let’s keep up the momentum! All my best, Gabby Giffords ** Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

GOP Gov. Greg Abbott has fewer than 72 hours to go until his FIRST fundraising deadline of 2021, and he’s STILL SHORT of his goal.

| | _There has to be some sort of mistake, Friend._

GOP Gov. Greg Abbott has fewer than 72 hours to go until his FIRST fundraising deadline of 2021, and he’s STILL SHORT of his goal.

To be completely honest, Friend, I was in shock when I heard this news. I figured that there was NO WAY that American conservatives wouldn’t step up when Gov. Abbott needed our help.

If you haven't yet, please read it below. | | | | | | | | | Thank you, Team Spanberger \----------Forwarded Message-------- From: Hakeem Jeffries Subject: we need Abigail in Congress Peter, I'll be blunt -- We need Abigail Spanberger in Congress. | Abigail is an outstanding public servant and I'm always impressed by her commitment to her constituents. clean_body: Biden was completely able to undo President Trump’s secure border and have... | | | Friend, Darin here. I have to say, I’m impressed. Biden was completely able to undo President Trump’s secure border and have the situation descend into a crisis in a matter of just 6 months. Joe Biden and his administration: → Stopped Construction of the Border Wall → Revoked Trump’s Suspension of the entry of illegal immigrants during the pandemic → Rescinded President Trump’s Remain in Mexico Policy For Joe Biden, it doesn’t matter that people are getting hurt, that border towns are suffering, or that the American taxpayer is footing the bill for his open-border crisis. All that Biden cares about is erasing President Trump’s legacy, regardless of who suffers the consequences. That’s who Joe Biden and Democrats have always been, willing to destroy and ruin America for more power. We can’t let that happen. We must save our country from the radical Left. clean_body: Joe Biden or Republicans | Peter, The situation at our Southern Border is absolutely out of control. Since Joe Biden was sworn in, illegal border crossings have seen record highs -- month after month with no end in sight. Things are so bad that State Republicans have had to take matters into their own hands: sending National Guard troops to the border and even making plans to finish Trump’s Wall without the help of Washington, DC. | | Do you trust Sleepy Joe Biden to secure the border? | | | | A nation without a border is no nation at all, Peter. We must get control of our border. An open border is a major national security threat! | Thank you. State Republicans Sent via North Carolina Republican Party

subject: CA recall has national implications
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rescue California - To Support the Recall of Gavin Newsom
body:
Whether you live in California or not, this recall has national implications. A recall of Gavin Newsom is a victory for America, not just California. | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d3cb70538e424e8cb4b3532ac763321d&_e=jyZ65884DrQjuCu-MNgQvxI4l5pJ6wALVytRoYawjUdLpHwl8GP8enWq2PmBou9pN3jeMwpCQXtCT8auwQJcrFQOKJD7UyKCJ2hYVDi0SEeojSQDKFG7Fh2JQbWqg_fD_nC-Ke5BU-4qhREpm2lJjToYJyV8J5TCU4pxgPYtCM04J2HyPzLcSPs1BO25ZlWhoHC2BtOYT1q5AATm6TcxF64YzhSfZb0TtOYq9mRgU2wNfq9_f2VU6D6FEI2mbNVL9fIbzMWFd3phU7XuQ4jiZWqjTV-WrhmrLbhqxLkHEFG1kSX2U3zOtY9bHaQxEBiaqZSmYUy3i97OYjwMNRbGzA%3D%3D)

Fellow conservative,

We're on the verge of **recalling the governor of the largest Democrat-run state in the country:** Gavin Newsom of California.

Whether you live in California or not, this recall has national implications.

If we can kick Newsom out of office it will not only transform California but **deal a huge blow to liberals across the country** - _including in Congress and the White House_ - who are trying to implement the same oppressive, destructive and radical agenda that he has. [**Which is why we need your help...**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d3cb70538e424e8cb4b3532ac763321d&_e=jyZ65884DrQjuCu-MNgQvxI4l5pJ6wALVytRoYawjUdLpHwl8GP8enWq2PmBou9pN3jeMwpCQXtCT8auwQJcrFQOKJD7UyKCJ2hYVDi0SEeojSQDKFG7Fh2JQbWqg_fDKDiB5r9Q2uRtY8zL1plEfyvXz4pAcug5CRjavcReFIweNHJVCkP-VplU54IIg_SgKs6ImgCv0D-0dBnr8gNFpF-9Dj94apSuKSoOyqN5U5YDKktbEl_B4M4I42OPSoLQPl9yQKn2fnbnG6VYJ32GC7Jac8545ALKL4ftv1sDcykXSgeByWD5vGhxWNhs99c2J8msFRMADEwh5wcb77r7Ew%3D%3D)

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d3cb70538e424e8cb4b3532ac763321d&_e=jyZ65884DrQjuCu-MNgQvxI4l5pJ6wALVytRoYawjUdLpHwl8GP8enWq2PmBou9pN3jeMwpCQXtCT8auwQJcrFQOKJD7UyKCJ2hYVDi0SEeojSQDKFG7Fh2JQbWqg_fD_9bA2d46XkcL_l51_fI59-lf1wr2KkkqAdgTnZ9Yc_6mPsWGxdRufyretO30g_vCEP3OX2MkoUHMWeeMF0HsqpUNzRlf_LZgNSGyzwi-5hM7DdXcoUKwWPCF5JFyys3Y6Z5R_QZpG3GvnuluPk9dO2SX180kf3SEazQYWm432T16o5hXxRvkgp6QuLN1uTCgDvBI05q6ATp6D1lUqvRbbQ%3D%3D)
Our Secretary of State just confirmed that enough valid signatures exist to **force a recall election this Fall** , which means we're pressing full steam ahead to kick Gavin to the curb and we need help from the grassroots across the nation who are **tired of the oppressive and radical liberal agenda.**

[**Will you help us deal a huge blow to the liberal agenda and recall the Left's favorite governor - Gavin Newsom - by chipping in $5, $15, $25, $50 or even $100 today?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d3cb70538e424e8cb4b3532ac763321d&_e=jyZ65884DrQjuCu-MNgQvxI4l5pJ6wALVytRoYawjUdLpHwl8GP8enWq2PmBou9pN3jeMwpCQXtCT8auwQJcrFQOKJD7UyKCJ2hYVDi0SEeojSQDKFG7Fh2JQbWqg_fDgDZVr32ko8hziFCH0Ulwz4Cmna6JvBwrzndn6XCtoFdj8rgx40VeQcSmD61KQseWIl9hhLf5h3_7Qw0MES9S4ZT5M-uk6R1JWz0j7fHmVw3fCG7qL4Fn_c8i-fcMAdDvcLqM2tQ75q5-HrCPlACP6UDtEdsmlCNa9GABBNGpVCQJ1qAtgi8SJ7SbO7etcpr2QujtZRtZ-lgpMOINr0gO_A%3D%3D)

[HELP RECALL NEWSOM!](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d3cb70538e424e8cb4b3532ac763321d&_e=jyZ65884DrQjuCu-MNgQvxI4l5pJ6wALVytRoYawjUdLpHwl8GP8enWq2PmBou9pN3jeMwpCQXtCT8auwQJcrFQOKJD7UyKCJ2hYVDi0SEeojSQDKFG7Fh2JQbWqg_fD5nt1HZxf87K2R5HNSRUwelBN1W9sajvvabRN5ssv4v52GVNtGD-EXvJGicsfnvfP86LXYX2Njsu13Iz7Cu_El4Vm26DQvjvuIH-N3WmGC_UWBC1KL4lNO9bhc8vNP1B0xkVL8aMGjfPpPPJ1ZtlpWbu7wfoiGiNtMBu7nkaf4oncGQfbUHiedx5mcJZzHosCZLDYpOS5uSAPGMtMWtNMhA%3D%3D)
Recalling Newsom will show liberals across the country that we won't stand for a government takeover of our lives, suspensions of our freedoms, destruction of our economy, or their corrupt, elitist hypocrisy while their failed policies destroy our livelihoods.

**A recall of Gavin Newsom is a victory for America, not just California.**

[**Will you help us defeat this failed, liberal governor by chipping in $5, $100 or whatever you can today?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d3cb70538e424e8cb4b3532ac763321d&_e=jyZ65884DrQjuCu-MNgQvxI4l5pJ6wALVytRoYawjUdLpHwl8GP8enWq2PmBou9pN3jeMwpCQXtCT8auwQJcrFQOKJD7UyKCJ2hYVDi0SEeojSQDKFG7Fh2JQbWqg_fDUGmAtD_N2pzy0jlqhHzg4eERZKK6QLsAba1nQM-RF4blQaXRqLyH7BCjW0O_ISWR1bdN4pFB1i0AdmD35eA33inmUI3bTUfKdYK28bD7wliXddhjJh0wHDTgv0HhJA0C_U1SnPdz5YhD3uZcgBKXiEiKMfTo3tCKZviA-FE5iZbwT_iqqzwOJjxiZiIAfQqDT5jiUlvW9sLnA8K6c-pxFg%3D%3D)

Tom Del Beccaro, Chairman
Rescue California - Recall Gavin Newsom

| | Source: **[Salon.com](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31622391/293238341/-338338834?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVjYjNjNDJjLTIxZDktZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FGTEtebSeRVYfO37CBLSg497V_3XUiGSSWktqIOqlL0=&emci=7c97ee5c-f5d8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=5cb3c42c-21d9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=5546903)** Merrick Garland is fighting back, Peter, and it's no surprise that Republicans in Georgia and across the country are attacking his integrity and his Department's motivations for the lawsuit. **Garland is fighting back against unconscionable attacks on our democracy by GOP legislatures nationwide seeking to restrict the right to vote.** Peter, Donald Trump, Georgia Governor Brian Kemp, and the rest of the sedition GOP is using the same tactics they've used for years whenever their authoritarian actions are called out, they're waging an all out smear campaign in the press. Now, their new target is Merrick Garland. **And we need to help him fight back.** Merrick Garland can't properly defend this lawsuit publicly (and call out the GOP's undemocratic agenda in the process) without violating ethics rules. body:
Republicans are only FIVE seats away from removing Nancy Pelosi from power and diminishing the influence of The Squad. | | [](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/58346583:sO2yR7dIN:m:1:2412808561:379861544613771DC70BBEB65685C884:r "Amy Ryan Courser for Congress")
---
|
Team - With your help, I received the highest number of votes for a Republican in our district's history and came so close to flipping the district from blue to red in 2020. **With your continued help, we CAN win in 2022 and take back the House of Representatives.** Our monthly fundraising deadline is this weekend - and I need your help to reach our goal. _We are just $2,178 away from our goal._ **[Click here to make a secure online contribution now.](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/58346582:sO2yR7dIN:m:1:2412808561:379861544613771DC70BBEB65685C884:r)** Our country cannot afford another two years of a Democrat-controlled Congress. Given the opportunity, Democrats' will continue removing our freedoms with their radical agenda. We must win back the House - the future of our country depends on it. Republicans are only FIVE seats away from removing Nancy Pelosi from power and diminishing the influence of The Squad. Defeating the liberal Representative Kurt Schrader is crucial to taking back the House. **[Will you help flip this district today?](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/58346582:sO2yR7dIN:m:1:2412808561:379861544613771DC70BBEB65685C884:r)** | [WIN BACK THE HOUSE](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/58346582:sO2yR7dIN:m:1:2412808561:379861544613771DC70BBEB65685C884:r)
---
Democrats proved they cannot be trusted with power. Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer, and Nancy Pelosi have caved to the radical Left of the Democrat Party time and time again. They have relinquished control to the socialist members of The Squad. **_And Schrader is no different - he votes with Pelosi 98% of the time._**

Since January, Democrats have:
* Pushed highly partisan spending bills that fund the far Left's wish list
* Attempted to make radical changes to our elections system that make it LESS secure
* Rewrote the definition of "infrastructure" to justify massive spending and tax increases
* Proposed massive tax increases that impact everyone
* Created - and ignored - a border crisis and continued the 'kids in cages' policies started under Barack Obama (which they tried to pin on President Trump)

The Democrats are NOT interested in doing what's best for all Americans. They are only interested in catering to the radical Left and pushing their socialist agenda.
[WIN BACK THE HOUSE](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/58346582:sO2yR7dIN:m:1:2412808561:379861544613771DC70BBEB65685C884:r)
---
We must act now to send a message to my Democrat opponent. **[Will you chip in $25, $50, or even $100 to help us meet our end-of-month fundraising goal? ](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/58346582:sO2yR7dIN:m:1:2412808561:379861544613771DC70BBEB65685C884:r)**

Sending Democrats packing is possible - **[will you help them pack with a contribution today?](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/58346582:sO2yR7dIN:m:1:2412808561:379861544613771DC70BBEB65685C884:r)**
[WIN BACK THE HOUSE](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/58346582:sO2yR7dIN:m:1:2412808561:379861544613771DC70BBEB65685C884:r)
---
Thank you,

Amy Ryan Courser
Conservative Republican for Congress

[DONATE](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/58346582:sO2yR7dIN:m:1:2412808561:379861544613771DC70BBEB65685C884:r)

name: Team Inslee
subject: We're raising the standard for bold climate action
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
The climate crisis isn't some distant prediction anymore.

| [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/aR3jCK2NZ3CP/SmNnZWgwZUl2NW9nUmdOaG1aU0R2S1hkWFNORWpML3NYcWE5dzAwSXpNa3dZdDcrejZRblBPN1JIUjQrL3h6YjU3bU5qc3NHbDFtbkt3enZJQ2s1SmNTa2lpK3JRV2haeWROOXZNSmxnVEk9S0/bVdOYjZhWFo4RnlxMU03Z2lKb3lWY08yTTQ3ZVh3ejhvWUtqZG05dzNwMD0S1) Friend, Thanks to supporters like you, Washington state is raising the global standard for bold climate action -- literally. **[We'll explain what we mean below. But first, we've gotta ask: Can you chip in before tomorrow's official fundraising deadline to keep the progress going?](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/AGbNcmw4deHR/SmNnZWgwZUl2NW9nUmdOaG1aU0R2S1hkWFNORWpML3NYcWE5dzAwSXpNa3dZdDcrejZRblBPN1JIUjQrL3h6YjU3bU5qc3NHbDFtbkt3enZJQ2s1SmNTa2lpK3JRV2haeWROOXZNSmxnVEk9S0/bVdOYjZhWFo4RnlxMU03Z2lKb3lWY08yTTQ3ZVh3ejhvWUtqZG05dzNwMD0S1)** Here's the deal: In our most recent legislative session, we passed a new Clean Fuel Standard that will cut carbon emissions from transportation (our largest source of carbon pollution) and create more jobs in our growing clean energy sector. What's more, our new Climate Commitment Act puts us on a path to net-zero carbon emissions by 2050, while giving members of frontline communities a voice in policy design and investment decisions. But for the four months that our legislative session was underway, we were legally barred from fundraising, and now we are making up for lost time. As our official, public end-of-month fundraising deadline approaches, we're asking every supporter to chip in to keep our progress going. **[Will you contribute before our deadline (midnight tomorrow!) to continue to make Washington state an example of what bold climate action looks like?](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/AGbNcmw4deHR/SmNnZWgwZUl2NW9nUmdOaG1aU0R2S1hkWFNORWpML3NYcWE5dzAwSXpNa3dZdDcrejZRblBPN1JIUjQrL3h6YjU3bU5qc3NHbDFtbkt3enZJQ2s1SmNTa2lpK3JRV2haeWROOXZNSmxnVEk9S0/bVdOYjZhWFo4RnlxMU03Z2lKb3lWY08yTTQ3ZVh3ejhvWUtqZG05dzNwMD0S1)** With your support, we'll show the rest of the country that bold climate action and a thriving economy can go hand in hand! clean_body: The climate crisis isn't some distant prediction anymore. | Friend, Thanks to supporters like you, Washington state is raising the global standard for bold climate action -- literally. Here's the deal: In our most recent legislative session, we passed a new Clean Fuel Standard that will cut carbon emissions from transportation (our largest source of carbon pollution) and create more jobs in our growing clean energy sector. What's more, our new Climate Commitment Act puts us on a path to net-zero carbon emissions by 2050, while giving members of frontline communities a voice in policy design and investment decisions. But for the four months that our legislative session was underway, we were legally barred from fundraising, and now we are making up for lost time. As our official, public end-of-month fundraising deadline approaches, we're asking every supporter to chip in to keep our progress going. With your support, we'll show the rest of the country that bold climate action and a thriving economy can go hand in hand! Thanks, Team Inslee |

body:
we'll have a clear idea where things stand. | |
---
| | [ ](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=6a3e77769d&e=0b94e583bc)
---
| |
By this time tomorrow, we’ll have a good idea of whether or not we’re going to reach our End of Quarter goal of raising another $7,500 — [**if you haven’t chipped in yet, can you please do so right now?**](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=5c64ee8f59&e=0b94e583bc)

**Here’s why I’m asking.** Joe Biden and the Democrats took power five months ago. Since then, they’ve set out on a mission to forever change America as we know it. They’ve done the following:
* Paid people not to work.
* Opened our borders.
* Crippled our energy independence by ending Keystone XL.
* **Attempted to nationalize our elections so they have permanent power.**

---
| [ ](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=19857eef0b&e=0b94e583bc)
---
|
---
| Their agenda is as radical as it gets, and I’m working to hold the line against it every single day in the U.S. Senate.

But the truth is, if we don’t have the resources it takes to expose their agenda — and present ours — to the American people, we don’t stand much of a chance of stopping them.

**That’s why I need your help. Every donation — whether it’s $50 or just $5 — will be put towards winning back our House and Senate majorities. **

The next 24 hours make or break our fundraising goal for this quarter. **[If you haven’t already, please chip in now.](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=7c466e1ff0&e=0b94e583bc) **

[](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=28ab6887b8&e=0b94e583bc)
Senator Roger Marshall

---
| P.S. — I’m working every day to deliver results for Kansas and America. If we don’t meet our fundraising goals, we can’t tell our story. [**I’m counting on your help, please chip in now!**](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=361c2d6d16&e=0b94e583bc)

**He's taking our Kansas values to the U.S. Senate, but he can't get it done without your help.**

We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference.

Fellow American,

Classic Washington DC was on full display last week.

Senate Republicans negotiated a bipartisan infrastructure package – in good faith – with five “moderate” Democrats who give the outward appearance of being amiable & serious in their quest to find compromise.

Leave it to Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi to move the finish line on Senate negotiators mere hours after a very public announcement at the White House – in front of the national press.

We honestly wonder who is calling the shots. Is it Biden? Is it Schumer? Is it Pelosi? **Or is it Bernie Sanders and Elizabeth Warren threatening to tank any piece of legislation that is negotiated that doesn’t meet their sky-high expectations?**

**[None of this would be happening if Mitch McConnell were still Senate majority leader...](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=efefce28ba8f47228effe5568f3751b4&_e=6lTLK50M7HhEyzXGAaLr_JkAAz0jE3SFlDmRry8KrmPocNTA9nHrFatFw-65aqRE5DxBLgK408OBbfTYAN4KSYErQMnD5z13Cz1gY0-egjn89NpoYuvAUzxMBVXh31DTPfnr97LOsEEnTULn5OoNAcowkOvIobmU3su3T3aFTDZ-s9aZIMP8OQ6M45HKEIjTciKlhtn9sxeR4D1PtMRVinZSRqUTKklpu_TcciS-BeGE-lMXUGbJ1bl4WCCQJlwtlyrwHMQI3wIQDw-OljEQdpDDzXWASUMW5i_74zX8JmGM1ekdVwUokMlSf2zDOkTooossRlBdeGVWpeWJlxGi69IwpMGV1S26ShAJCOLskxZltYu93TlOqwLyht6JvM1nnHactY6pNzJGYQ1nEsyAhLTB6uFJl9824azf7-gd_CAQAQOIDM-wOz4QT210XQwQqPbKflFPlfq0qnGuAgD4FQ%3D%3D)**

We’re nearing the end of the 2nd fundraising quarter of the year; and with a little more than 48 hours until our deadline we’re proud to report that we’ve raised 98% of our goal. But we can’t rest yet. **[Won’t you please consider helping us reach 100% of our goal by chipping in $10, $50 or even $100 right now?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=efefce28ba8f47228effe5568f3751b4&_e=6lTLK50M7HhEyzXGAaLr_JkAAz0jE3SFlDmRry8KrmPocNTA9nHrFatFw-65aqRE5DxBLgK408OBbfTYAN4KSYErQMnD5z13Cz1gY0-egjn89NpoYuvAUzxMBVXh31DTPfnr97LOsEEnTULn5OoNAcowkOvIobmU3su3T3aFTDZ-s9aZIMP8OQ6M45HKEIjTciKlhtn9sxeR4D1PtMRVinZSRqUTKklpu_TcciS-BeGE-lMXUGbJ1bl4WCCQJlwtvtXKABAbZ2getmi8QblQDYWsPtyRd6juv4puzqyJbcAliR9tLeOuCZRXABYNXUwu49EcPQOlEKw7HRyGsZHQILxub5FY_GtplskeeNtexD_JNJP3iCKZko_s12_zY902QH169gXntyYtahy-rLA51ib8UDihlBL8zhSucHd90pyKvvMkWIob0fKEHmeoZCiu_QCqb5sLe6BYA92ZSF4Bgw%3D%3D)**

**Until Republicans are able to take back control of the Senate, America is going to be held hostage by the political left**.

| [**STOP THE POLITICAL BLACKMAIL
HELP US WIN BACK THE MAJORITY** **› › **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=efefce28ba8f47228effe5568f3751b4&_e=6lTLK50M7HhEyzXGAaLr_JkAAz0jE3SFlDmRry8KrmPocNTA9nHrFatFw-65aqRE5DxBLgK408OBbfTYAN4KSYErQMnD5z13Cz1gY0-egjn89NpoYuvAUzxMBVXh31DTPfnr97LOsEEnTULn5OoNAcowkOvIobmU3su3T3aFTDZ-s9aZIMP8OQ6M45HKEIjTciKlhtn9sxeR4D1PtMRVinZSRqUTKklpu_TcciS-BeGE-lMXUGbJ1bl4WCCQJlwtPbMXutNH9muFFFVpLRLHzDUhpfHOZNcau1bPkTrWpX9vLZLt3XRD1u9xwg9kVkAiyfC_Y4Dr6sRfQgeTk3RvZ3uoVu0Oxh0La60NS-SWWaCnPhHn8hZqZeeOjUOZOOIu7B6GJQ7Ccak21Ad9JRaZ0pZg0AWEFNYACHX47IReLRYbhy9iSdGTHeOgaOaaLmQJo8kDtKeKGlgTmOqnzE-RmA%3D%3D)
---
* More spending
* Higher taxes
* MORE POLITICAL BLACKMAIL

The national media and Democrats alike are going to looking to see how much Senate Republicans raised in this quarter, and we cannot come up short one penny. The country is too important to let Dems run it into the ground, and we hope that our sense of urgency is not being lost in email text.

**[Please be generous with your donation today. We really need your help.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=efefce28ba8f47228effe5568f3751b4&_e=6lTLK50M7HhEyzXGAaLr_JkAAz0jE3SFlDmRry8KrmPocNTA9nHrFatFw-65aqRE5DxBLgK408OBbfTYAN4KSYErQMnD5z13Cz1gY0-egjn89NpoYuvAUzxMBVXh31DTPfnr97LOsEEnTULn5OoNAcowkOvIobmU3su3T3aFTDZ-s9aZIMP8OQ6M45HKEIjTciKlhtn9sxeR4D1PtMRVinZSRqUTKklpu_TcciS-BeGE-lMXUGbJ1bl4WCCQJlwtVy3YaZLa4PK12VZ_3rmxz1_YHNbwKGbY73q_Q3nWiOGJnwFD2sij_rIMswpAgPuEmZOS1WoltJFFilCUH9Z0QSN7fZ0Fa4PDZ-uNqlCPjgIpWLq24C2DM4vi2n20GdOu6GcJ0jgrpQpcx3PBFmmaNwNjmGCPZq7eK42oTGo3WDNXPfqt-JomqTOO-odVaEguBaVYwoGuhzgCLHwYTAn4Ww%3D%3D)**

Remember when Joe Biden centered his entire campaign around governing from the center – as a moderate? Yea, we do, too.

Let’s not fall for the DEMS’ Fake news anymore.

Thanks for all of your help
Senate Republicans

Team, here’s what we’re up against:
**Anti-democratic attacks.** Extremist politicians have seen our 20 historic wins in red and blue states, and now they’re trying to change the rules to make it harder to run and win people-powered ballot initiatives. They want to limit the time allowed to collect signatures, require 60% to win instead of a simple majority, and _even require signatures to be collected on petitions the size of beach towels._
**[We’re working hard to stop these anti-democratic attacks and keep winning, but we need your help. Chip in before tomorrow’s end-of-quarter deadline.>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31623220/293240787/-392876194?refcode=em0629_espy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmUzMGZkNy0yNGQ5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bFyZvE09biD_51pLKceQK6odL0VOUJ0-CrInkA2s_jw=)**
**A rigged political system.** The filibuster, special interests, lobbying, reconciliation, outdated rules -- it’s all designed to block the change we need and to help corporate donors over working people. That’s why we run people-powered ballot initiative campaigns to make change directly at the ballot box -- we’ve won 20 so far but we’re not done yet.
**[Help us break through the rigged system and win more people-powered ballot initiatives by donating before tomorrow’ deadline.>> ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31623221/293240788/-392876194?refcode=em0629_espy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmUzMGZkNy0yNGQ5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bFyZvE09biD_51pLKceQK6odL0VOUJ0-CrInkA2s_jw=)**
With your help, we’re going to keep fighting back against these attacks and winning campaigns to change lives directly at the ballot box.
Thanks for being by our side,
The Fairness Project HQ

Paid for by The Fairness Project. Thank you for supporting The Fairness Project. Your unwavering support helps us bring economic fairness to millions of Americans and put power directly in the hands of voters through ballot initiatives. The Fairness Project has won 20 ballot initiatives since 2016, changing the lives of nearly 18 million people by raising the minimum wage, expanding access to health care, capping payday lending, and winning paid leave. And we're just getting started. clean_body: Need your help before tomorrow’s deadline. | = Here’s the deal, team: we all know how hard it is to win real change. Our political system is rigged to block progress, our politics are too divided, and extremist politicians are making it harder to make our voices heard. But we’re responding, and in just five years, we’ve won 20 campaigns -- even in deep red states like Arkansas and Oklahoma. And with your help, we’ll keep winning. = | = Team, here’s what we’re up against: Anti-democratic attacks. Extremist politicians have seen our 20 historic wins in red and blue states, and now they’re trying to change the rules to make it harder to run and win people-powered ballot initiatives. They want to limit the time allowed to collect signatures, require 60% to win instead of a simple majority, and even require signatures to be collected on petitions the size of beach towels. = A rigged political system. The filibuster, special interests, lobbying, reconciliation, outdated rules -- it’s all designed to block the change we need and to help corporate donors over working people. That’s why we run people-powered ballot initiative campaigns to make change directly at the ballot box -- we’ve won 20 so far but we’re not done yet. = With your help, we’re going to keep fighting back against these attacks and winning campaigns to change lives directly at the ballot box. Thanks for being by our side, The Fairness Project HQ = Paid for by The Fairness Project. Thank you for supporting The Fairness Project. Your unwavering support helps us bring economic fairness to millions of Americans and put power directly in the hands of voters through ballot initiatives. The Fairness Project has won 20 ballot initiatives since 2016, changing the lives of nearly 18 million people by raising the minimum wage, expanding access to health care, capping payday lending, and winning paid leave. And we're just getting started. If you would like more ways to keep in touch and stay involved, please consider following us on and . Your partnership allows us to make all this possible. If you'd like to donate to help fund our efforts, please =. Funds raised will be used to support ballot measures, on-the-ground efforts, and other advocacy activities in support of working families. Peter, it's been a hard year, and while we're looking towards a better future -- there is still looming uncertainty. Voting rights remain in jeopardy, and redistricting could make major changes to California's Congressional districts.

[That's why I'm more determined than ever to keep serving you and fighting for Central Coast values in Congress. Will you pitch in a donation today to help us get closer to our June end of quarter fundraising goal?](https://act.myngp.com/el/KZYPQXExr1LAZLNltlZObUPoCab1puli1OVM0SjgvZE=/45TuKkOmAAIPMw7o4PWBymoqNVf4mvDEhysr1cEGGoc=?refcode=JP_EM_FR_FL_210629_1_5)

There's a lot at stake, and now that we're halfway through the year, this June FEC deadline is especially important. Everyone will be watching to see if Democrats have what it takes to hold the House after next year's midterm elections. If we miss our fundraising goal, people will take notice.

[Can I count on you to step up and make a donation today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/KZYPQXExr1LAZLNltlZObUPoCab1puli1OVM0SjgvZE=/45TuKkOmAAIPMw7o4PWBymoqNVf4mvDEhysr1cEGGoc=?refcode=JP_EM_FR_FL_210629_1_5)

Jimmy Panetta

Contributions are not tax deductible for Federal income tax purposes. Individuals may take a tax credit on Arkansas tax returns, up to a total of $50 per individual for political contributions made each year.

clean_body: These radicals really think that they can BUY votes... Peter, I know my team has already reached out about the big negative ad buy that has been placed against me in Arkansas. That’s why I KNOW we’re going to meet our $100,000 goal to fight back BEFORE our End-Of-Quarter deadline on June 30th. And it starts with you chipping in now: I won’t sit back and let these far-left radicals push their agenda on us. I will always stand up to them. I will always fight back. And I hope you’ll be on my side as I do it. Each individual, political party committee, legislative caucus committee or approved political action committee may contribute up to $2,800 for the primary election and $2,800 for the general election -- for a total of $5,600. Corporate contributions are not permissible. Contributions are not tax deductible for Federal income tax purposes. Individuals may take a tax credit on Arkansas tax returns, up to a total of $50 per individual for political contributions made each year. Contributions from foreign nationals are prohibited by law. State law requires that we collect and report name, address, employer and occupation for each contributor.

name: Team Blumenthal
subject: Senate control on the line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=9zUaZVWp0U0EBgnt4O9mNt%2FW0jk1Ct44&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend, we're in real danger of falling short of our end-of-quarter FEC goal tomorrow - and Sen. Blumenthal is counting on you to chip in now to get us back on track.
Here's why falling short is not an option: If Democrats lose even a single Senate seat, Mitch McConnell and the GOP will once again call the shots. That means we'll have zero opportunity to pass bold infrastructure investments, to preserve and expand voting rights, to tackle the epidemic of gun violence, or to protect women's healthcare. There is too much at stake. This chance for progress after four years of Donald Trump is too necessary and too vital to fail.
That's why your support today is so critical. The campaign arm of the Senate GOP - controlled by Mitch McConnell - is already targeting Sen. Blumenthal for defeat. To protect this seat and defend Democratic control of the Senate, we're counting on grassroots activists like you to pitch in now.
With our fundraising numbers going public shortly and only one day left to reach our goal, we risk being outpaced by the GOP's megadonors. **[So if you can, will you please rush a donation of $5 or more now to help Sen. Blumenthal hit this FEC fundraising goal, protect this must-win seat, and ensure Democratic control of the Senate?](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1041-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
Thank you for chipping in to support our grassroots movement and keep the Senate in Democratic control.
Team Blumenthal

name: Derek Marshall
subject: Let's talk about LGBTQ+ rights -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
It's almost the end of Pride month, but we've got more to fight for!

Hi Peter,
It’s Derek. As we begin to cap off this year’s amazing Pride month, I’ve been reflecting on the many issues that the LGBTQ+ community—my community—still faces every day.
**As I run to become the first LGBTQ+ Congressmember to represent CA-08, addressing these issues is crucial, not just for me, but for every mother who worries about sending her gay son to high school, every trans woman who loses her job after coming out, and every immigrant who comes from a country where their identity is criminalized to this one, only to find that a different aspect of their identity is criminalized.**
That is why today, in honor of the final days of Pride month, I am releasing my campaign platform on LGBTQ+ issues.
[**And I want you to be the first to see it! Here are some of the policies I will be bringing and supporting in Congress to continue to bring equality and justice to our community.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31624171/293244639/1305928880?refcode=em-lgbtq_platform&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Mzc3YWI3OS0yN2Q5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2zYyCWEncpQ804GyL_Qc66u8gS8FXtmtg-AyMe271kM=)
[****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31624174/293244640/766226545?refcode=em-lgbtq_platform&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Mzc3YWI3OS0yN2Q5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2zYyCWEncpQ804GyL_Qc66u8gS8FXtmtg-AyMe271kM=)
We stand on the shoulders of the activists and organizers that came before us, and while we have come a long way, the fight is not over.
**In fact, my own Congressional Representative here in CA-08 voted against the Equality Act. It was one of his first votes, this explicit rejection of federal protections for queer and trans folks. .**
That does not reflect the district, it does not reflect the community, and it does not reflect what I think of as core American values: freedom, dignity, and caring for our neighbors.
**[Our end of quarter deadline is TOMORROW. Can you chip in today to help us reach our goal so we can bring equality and equity for every single member of California’s 8th by sending our first ever openly gay representative to Washington?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31624175/293244643/1305928880?refcode=em-lgbtq_platform&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Mzc3YWI3OS0yN2Q5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2zYyCWEncpQ804GyL_Qc66u8gS8FXtmtg-AyMe271kM=)**
In Solidarity,
**Derek Marshall**
Candidate for Congress, CA-08
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31624176/293244644/1305928880?refcode=em-lgbtq_platform&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Mzc3YWI3OS0yN2Q5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2zYyCWEncpQ804GyL_Qc66u8gS8FXtmtg-AyMe271kM=)

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
We need the resources to win Friend, Did you see Derek’s email? We’re approaching the end of our first full quarter since launching our campaign, and we’re counting on Patriots, like YOU, to ensure that we finish strong. clean_body: Tomorrow's deadline... | | | Team – Our fragile Senate majority will come down to a handful of vulnerable Democrats across the country, and Maggie is the top Republican target. In 2016, she won by only 1,017 votes, making it the closest race that cycle – and it's looking like 2022 won't be any different. Tomorrow is our biggest fundraising deadline to date, and our numbers are falling behind what the other Democrats are reporting, making this campaign even more vulnerable. Republicans are already spending BIG to unseat Maggie, and if we don't hit our end-of-quarter goal, it will only get worse. = | | = Losing even one Senate seat means losing our narrow Senate majority – and Mitch McConnell is laser-focused on New Hampshire. We need Maggie in the Senate, fighting for the Granite State and building on Democrats' progress. = Thank you for being a part of the team. – Maggie's campaign team Maggie for NH | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: Trump’s recent public appearance in Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marcy Kaptur for Congress **[marcykaptur
body:
President Trump came here for his first post-presidential rally, and it’s difficult to fathom why given his broken promises to the people of Lorain and all over Ohio. | | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/tTBUZwcBH_2q13Ow12s-jW8LunJ2OwfFg1eFfpUpfkxgDfPj5qCyNPMnISo34ApNUnbq8vGzNM_pb72g_GbHGrsrFvXKWAX7qbAis_vnoApf1NF9Tbr848mWJWrYKfiEbNNsrTg9ppF4ktOQZtz8MCE_f86BJXxvZ9w4aJFVT2XHdy76e7J-vWR5vpy7saLarAWXhza3pgyS18Ijfdd6BF4pyZuWNWzgo5wIT1Vqr9xswcGudQRGEBLp1c7q3NST/3d6/MrJvqq7XTWShUMZ2prX64Q/h0/paAo485AIotTLkHiDf59-iIgVUx78ttGLk5Ov7eNq2k) Dear Friend, Trump’s recent public appearance in Ohio is a serious reminder of the work that we have to do to protect our communities from disinformation and right-wing extremism. The conspiracy theories that followed the 2020 election were an attack on our democracy and the will of the people, and they must be stopped.
**We can’t allow Trump’s election grievances to dictate Ohio’s path forward when he has done nothing for our great state. I’m still trying to understand why he chose to come here for his first post-presidential rally despite the broken promises in Lorain and all over Ohio.**
My work has always been about serving people, not political interests. That is why I am worried that this distraction and attempt to sow greater division in our communities is holding us back from focusing on the issues that matter most.
[**I am working hard to pass key legislation that will help our families get back on their feet, but I can’t do this without you. Can you donate $25 to our campaign today to help us deliver policies that will help working Americans?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNXS5KvDi5wrxDE5VytOtCwVpc5i8Die8BmDyLxt2uxyuGBSom91ag8VBHe1Hl_ROXgAjj37Kfau6hHY1EEuTJ4WxG_o2UVhvhCwRx2774gipWdAQwGliSAPM0nkQ1GtysNTzsyTDD4fQ936QnBoMz-nlgngbExTU8t1-tQkCs4wLDm-opY-KC-l1fIhEkYn67GErvBuFmhodakh8_huz9CT8STi4aytR_gGnT68KbfKMBUwCmQZgxEMn6Er-VXUI0zdp4pZfGEsIBspsbqM_tSzkDeL_MeYRFeHfPcZxIv3NZd_W47gd4YdFNuqCYIA3BHWMjGUUde698oFy8KLX0oCXAo5Hb2RuQipmirIZzHrLRV7WwEA-vZgd4wGZdMLQ/3d6/MrJvqq7XTWShUMZ2prX64Q/h1/ZDfbitiNP0LDHMQ0E3JlZ1RJqHgbZfocxWHYFRTpvtg) | [DONATE](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNXS5KvDi5wrxDE5VytOtCwVpc5i8Die8BmDyLxt2uxyuGBSom91ag8VBHe1Hl_ROXgAjj37Kfau6hHY1EEuTJ4WxG_o2UVhvhCwRx2774gv-ivi6oODg3un-e6xQ02G6SEm2YcIU8qufiHUsL3SqZR49x_vfNpxS-av5zfApzey0ulZ7Vk4h4iuczQ-Tnq0PU039UZhi-5iJNZtpNESkq5wkYjA-0h2ffjZUcNwlIgFawYcj281fgOGeVtoyNs7zsnZupa7OFtCc6O_Ld7cO5pKpX9X2n1TatIu92vwh0ywDATPCD97JtwPZTjpLAx7y9gDp2KxB6VOS7OjDXgoVfFCMvZAXcBdJ_aR8vtZIyEjV-A6XSwAS22O8ccSmDAOk/3d6/MrJvqq7XTWShUMZ2prX64Q/h2/qNQgEHy_gzTzrQ7Ch6h9kqZHqo1vR8X5wsS4NYbfJwE)

name: Jake Oakman
subject: The secret to Indiana’s success
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Indiana is shattering records and reaching new heights (despite all odds!) all because Hoosiers like you have stepped up to make it happen. [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=c4ab3e16ce6346e484597df170fb3a87&_e=g2yBSjegNMzYxvudt-ISh8iwLEQag2UA5aZFWyHOuIQljTNjN0l_ivEpQatOUtsd_nmiRTxQUeNItYrX0jA7aYJyjg3Yzb9gyIBE46dZg7O4rHy08LUgMzE6pTYYadHlzMM9fFKx18L9sNaVrh9ZEhXpo3PviINbNpnHCLZeXAF3XspUudsbMbgYrQxXf730TUYpxyrkaF8ZjGKf3ZtHaxlnXnVthGL3mCyc0leWVEI87nQ_8VudAGktr4rrTG1e-1UkW1kp1Vie2mlAWl_Qt0ZvJCP0NrCtPZjhXYt45s3vwN5F4Fe9s8XWWWKTD18AQ4Rjfi2B6QlJ-2_j1GqZMypIlQAHgipLFSv_7d4801WUJsU8hlrUVsjrCrXghAWikdfJTQRlSkHPqqcUql4dt6w14jvA1khanTxPmqSHsazSjYlH9gx8niaxPA1oHe0U0GTZHAUBPJsfZ2TNXKxSA9vrXJGk7p2fihB9VTy9azM%3D) Friend, it’s undeniable: _Indiana is shattering records and reaching new heights (despite all odds!) all because_** _Hoosiers like you have stepped up to make it happen. _** Behind Governor Holcomb’s leadership, we’re putting the pandemic behind us, creating new opportunities for Hoosiers of all walks of life, and making headlines for all the right reasons. To be frank, it’s a far cry from what we see happening in states led by liberal governors. [**Tomorrow marks the last day of the quarter, and it’s our last chance to close out the first half of 2021 on a strong note.**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=c4ab3e16ce6346e484597df170fb3a87&_e=g2yBSjegNMzYxvudt-ISh8iwLEQag2UA5aZFWyHOuIQljTNjN0l_ivEpQatOUtsd_nmiRTxQUeNItYrX0jA7aYJyjg3Yzb9gyIBE46dZg7O4rHy08LUgMzE6pTYYadHlzMM9fFKx18L9sNaVrh9ZEhXpo3PviINbNpnHCLZeXAF3XspUudsbMbgYrQxXf730TUYpxyrkaF8ZjGKf3ZtHaxlnXnVthGL3mCyc0leWVEI87nQ_8VudAGktr4rrTG1e-1UkW1kp1Vie2mlAWl_Qt9BU7z5hkrYsYQGULs1h9ls3ImhNXax0LV--uFNcf1hpmTITerA1zcnyrZJJup6qzF11woXKnDvVjIWKf8VOwqt8PqJUXDW-vVDPnpfxTv8xckGNdE3PLb0660FkAmRobLiP2pxiROuyEoHoJ9O81pnDuMejIaiGpnPRfy84WDa96Y6BMe8QKUQs05Xhc_fj3KpHtQOqbsb5ADmBUGjXp5s%3D) We’re off to an incredible start this year and Governor Holcomb is determined to make the second half of 2021 even _better_ for Indiana with:
* MORE economic investment
* MORE job opportunities
* MORE forward progress

**You’ve been a vital part of our mission to create One Indiana for All so far, friend. Can we count on you to help us keep it going before our**[**11:59PM deadline tomorrow****?**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=c4ab3e16ce6346e484597df170fb3a87&_e=g2yBSjegNMzYxvudt-ISh8iwLEQag2UA5aZFWyHOuIQljTNjN0l_ivEpQatOUtsd_nmiRTxQUeNItYrX0jA7aYJyjg3Yzb9gyIBE46dZg7O4rHy08LUgMzE6pTYYadHlzMM9fFKx18L9sNaVrh9ZEhXpo3PviINbNpnHCLZeXAF3XspUudsbMbgYrQxXf730TUYpxyrkaF8ZjGKf3ZtHaxlnXnVthGL3mCyc0leWVEI87nQ_8VudAGktr4rrTG1e-1UkW1kp1Vie2mlAWl_Qt-VA_2nrzryoWRktklgp-EA7T4jufTO4iCr_EgMyN04O8C87e2iP7VyhjzkaOyyJg_30N_mwgWw7lw9dQdG2BdPenH8IYt_pkEjMMnOc5W8wjFBB3IXIjE9Ukv-Td91RZ3zgVdOAT8PRMwmu95C6Ji9dc3xOiiGVKsmCIP4Z6qKoz8E6tZF9YHX1wwaMTGXiTbByafxgd1DGg2QR6nRjrVc%3D) name: Mark McCloskey
subject: 887 donations needed by MIDNIGHT tonight.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark McCloskey for Missouri
body:
We about 90% of the way toward reaching our quarterly fundraising goal. We just need 887 more donations and we'll be there. Can you chip in right now? When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on July 14th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for.

| [](http://links.mccloskeyforsenate.com/u/click?_t=1e2ca10b732d41a38216798ae8311f64&_m=a0e85f5d34cb48c79efdb7990ac4bbe3&_e=gBSvhp1n5wCaLVXyYFLUu68aIoNPbLsrsnH19MmSWA8unBgeDzm2kuJxgso3ifFosxU7Z01QnYUiSuAQckEULgUj5TjvSs71PXO8WqIB0ETSqyC0SCwPU_wsnk4vb4Y4ipSQWMoAXFcHYuSfCgYmkXqjQ6oCuRuFVt8LmDMUnDXjnEOr0YbQlHNM3W4SMeZqj0-FQDEagTXA0fwX8FNNI9RMsOZg3YOIH9eMe8a--a0MzSatVezYubcTtqeo8723aJD-1TmAp19wwdqwIpgvfamb4sPcQhHcTyWwZjInPRhkQ9UqqTzArgmSNEdNssTmHD3Is975i-aazIxi30gJprS1FZTwYyTdaW3aKOFsXLOo00R74DT8mr-9vqjRwpgM8DmBWowvK4OI3yLPoR2LhV5wxrtswA06qC9O1YtcAMsaNuB6AKkBpNomTkNHZUvKozOU8AF8UwTU0ThBLt-QT_S_kwYCgzA8cBTaPszZ9aQ%3D)
---

Fellow American,

I want to start off by thanking you for your generous support since I launched my campaign for the United States Senate last month. It's been an adventure from the beginning, and I know that this is only the beginning. So, if the last month is any indication of how fast time is going to go, well, then **before you know it Election Day will be upon us**.

In the month since I declared for the United States Senate, the Republican field of candidates has grown to **SEVEN**. What's clear to me now is that there is immense interest in winning this Senate seat.

Without further ado, I'll get to the point. subject: Our Squad is Growing and we need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Virginia Justice Democrats
body:
| | | | [ ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=605690d43e&e=76fc145c69)
---
| | | Team-

This past weekend we came together with electeds, candidates, and organizations at the 5th annual Women's Summit with Network NOVA, and all we can say is that our squad is definitely growing. We are going to be working with candidates from Northern Virginia all the way out to Norfolk, from Richmond to Roanoke, from Poquoson all the way over to Pulaski. But we can't do that without your help. [Can you chip in whatever you can afford now to help out VAJD? ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=750ab4e309&e=76fc145c69)
---
| [ ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=5785725bfa&e=76fc145c69)
---
| We're working to make a Virginia that looks like and works for the people that live in. We are currently helping support candidates around the Commonwealth, and we're approaching an important deadline.

We know, boy, we know! You get a million of these the last days of the quarter but we rely solely on the support from folks like you and we're working to make it so that money doesn't play a huge part in politics.

[But in order to change the system, we gotta work within that system. That's why we are calling on everyday people just like you to give to our cause. Can you pitch in $5, $25, $100, or anything in your budget? It would be an even bigger help if you made it monthly! Our sustaining donors are what keep us going! ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=3c911facc8&e=76fc145c69)

Let's go out there and elect these amazing candidates in the Fall!
---
| In Solidarity,
Virginia Justice Democrats

name: John Stossel
subject: The woke mob is scaring teachers. We can help.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Center for Independent Thought
body:
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c278%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=bfKDfFG6vxwuWLTTRN24pQ&sysid=1)
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4775%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pIKixXJ10WV%2bxV7tEFnQ8Q&sysid=1)

Friend,

Teachers tell me that Critical Race Theory and wokeism may be the greatest threats to liberty today.

At a recent Stossel in the Classroom Town Hall for educators, concerned teachers asked us:
* _Is it safe to have a real dialogue in staff trainings about critical race theory?_
* _How can we get our schools and society back to respecting free speech and welcoming professional discourse and debate?_
* _How do I convince my students that the U.S. is the greatest country on Earth? Many do not believe that._

Teachers shouldn’t have to worry about their professional future for voicing their opinions. Not in America.

The woke mob is scaring teachers and teaching kids to hate America and reject free market capitalism. They sow seeds of hatred against the core values we cherish: liberty, limited government, and personal responsibility.

[**Our program - Stossel in the Classroom - helps students learn more about the ideas of liberty. Can you help me get Stossel in the Classroom in front of more students? **](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4776%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xekI6BsUSkhdRdUQ9Rusew&sysid=1)

For over 20 years, Stossel in the Classroom has equipped teachers with the tools needed to educate young minds.

**By providing educators with brief, entertaining videos and lessons that teach high school and college students about the benefits of liberty, individualism, and markets, we keep the flame of liberty alive in America’s classrooms.**

[**You can support Stossel in the Classroom by making a donation by clicking here >>>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4777%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MBSR0stulDFTIgy8R94z8Q&sysid=1)

[**Donate $25 >>>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4778%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AxqNJZSf%2bKgnmiTB3KffKg&sysid=1)
[**Donate $35 >>>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4779%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nSDHHR0PUO%2fy3YsB3%2bcz%2fA&sysid=1)
[**Donate $50 >>>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4770%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JBQ2jXfSLfl0gKDebsR3VA&sysid=1)
[**Donate $100 >>>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4771%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=d5VkmXLFZGm6aTm3SOTLMQ&sysid=1)
[**Donate Any Amount >>>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4772%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fhQ%2bCAE3ecqx99rKd9oLUg&sysid=1)

**“I just finished my 32nd year of teaching history and I have no plans on retiring. I feel that it is my mission to instill a deep love for our country into as many students as I can and your videos are helping me do that. I also want to teach the students to love our constitutional republic and to not blindly trust the government. As long as God allows I will remain in the trenches to fight the good fight. The enemies of our nation do not rest - neither should we.” High School Teacher, Tennessee**

Teaching young people has become my life’s passion. Stossel In the Classroom connects with educators across the country and provides them with videos, teacher guides, worksheets, and other resources to help teach young people to think--not what to think.

**“I really love the resources that you have - I have even been known to send adult friends your videos to help explain issues to them. At this point, I don't really have any suggestions except to keep up the good work!” High School Teacher, Georgia**

Thousands of teachers say they rely on Stossel in the Classroom to provide educational materials that help students see that freedom is a better alternative to government controls and mandates.

**But I can’t do this without your help.**

Friend, will you step up and help us defeat the tools of socialist indoctrination by supporting Stossel in the Classroom? [**You can donate now >>>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4773%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=01nuIXkPwPg%2bPxQCZi1Yhw&sysid=1)

[**Donate $20.22 >>>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4774%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MUcXzu7PNDe4N5Pj75DPiA&sysid=1)
[**Donate $35 >>>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4779%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nSDHHR0PUO%2fy3YsB3%2bcz%2fA&sysid=1)
[**Donate $50 >>>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4770%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JBQ2jXfSLfl0gKDebsR3VA&sysid=1)
[**Donate $100 >>>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4771%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=d5VkmXLFZGm6aTm3SOTLMQ&sysid=1)

Elementary, middle school, and high school students need to hear another side. They need to hear that free markets create prosperity better than government controls.

Friend, we need Americans like you to support students in this fight for the future of our country.

In liberty,

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4775%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pIKixXJ10WV%2bxV7tEFnQ8Q&sysid=1)
John Stossel
Journalist - Stossel In The Classroom
Center for Independent Thought

Paid for by Center for Independent Thought
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c278%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=bfKDfFG6vxwuWLTTRN24pQ&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c278%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=bfKDfFG6vxwuWLTTRN24pQ&sysid=1)

body:
Did you see Lisa’s previous email? We’re under a massive end of quarter deadline, and we’re in need of your immediate contribution if we want to...... Did you see Lisa’s previous email? Peter, we’re under a massive end of quarter deadline, and we’re in need of your immediate contribution if we want to surpass this goal. 2021 has shown the country what the left means by “a return to normalcy” and “reunification”. While we had our suspicions, they have been confirmed. Instead of calling out acting in moderation while trying to work across the aisle, Susan Wild and the far left has sided with our foreign enemies rather than our allies, slowed a growing economy, and instilled marxist values across the country. Peter, we can’t stand this sort of behavior anymore. It is not what our country needs and it is certainly not who we are as proud Americans. Lisa generously opened a 3x match opportunity in order to defeat Susan Wild next November, and we need to hit our goal of $10,000. With only a few days left, and about $5,500 raised, we can’t let this opportunity slide. While it’s ambitious, we believe with patriots like yourself, we will be able to make it happen. **[Peter, will you help us? We have reached the halfway point in the year and 2022 is approaching quicker and quicker as each day passes. We simply cannot let Susan Wild and the Democrats stay in power any longer. America can’t take it. With their policy and rhetoric, America’s values, foreign policy, borders, and economy are crumbling right before our very eyes. Peter,**[the time is now. Can you help us? ](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=b06c39642b0f47bd9b6365ef9ffcde9f&_e=P6AP4Y6xOHPPFFAPXnn_tuWe_4C7nuYCdcIgJ5gpIFTr-7Kmbg6tf-mMnMD61ogGNWxYPTrN_xKFOQdFGxC0uRqgS7koPIdYYhVDehZ7dN3P37XrzFGcwY5ir519Ky3H4BfuOgMEPzU92QqLeCTOqP-FIjkO6N750rXjqlYZaPdxAC8PPO31wFsp23p41WS5z416PeEY8rUDOnC7rNShDumoPk-wODZqvtqOdpgLtGCerVs9Kip2Qi-GJomG0Zbl-5B3DjBX7zamyqTKVEJxZIvlM6G3wSCAmoDpv7Q3oc6odOXvJUY317kabtv5YhvPeMP8Y5DBb8B-Pzc7d0TNrxNLBc2pjOqWkqWglCm_0HHa_0bQxFX0qFqch5cKlANc1gFQRHE2IKe-7jSuzlEj6j_YCtbc0-wZGgTmQTpepidjG9JIvm1rNehU7VhN6lTQ-h0KtS5NuEfgZz-uCOgGZg%3D%3D)** Than you, Team Scheller \--------Forwarded Message Below------- Peter, What a ride 2021 has been. We are now halfway through the year and now one step closer to the November 2022 elections–all eyes will be on these races. Not only will these elections be monumental for our nation, but they are a great chance for our country to rebuke the radical left Susan Wild and her far left cronies for the ways they have shown their true colors, and it is time to finally vote them out of office. Instead of vying for the common sense policy our country needs, they keep trying to push our nation farther and farther left. Instead of **capitalism** , they have vouched for a government ruled economy. Instead of **opening the country up as quickly as possible** , they have tried to hold onto their power as long as possible. Instead of uniting the country on our **founding principles** , they have attempted to dismantle those principles in favor of anti-American rhetoric. Our country cannot take another two years of a Democrat-ruled House. If we do, the results could be cataclysmic.

Make Susan Wild and her voting record bold & loud. We need leaders who work for the future and prosperity of our nation — not dark blue values.

**[Peter, I am opening up a tremendous opportunity for you.](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=b06c39642b0f47bd9b6365ef9ffcde9f&_e=P6AP4Y6xOHPPFFAPXnn_tuWe_4C7nuYCdcIgJ5gpIFTr-7Kmbg6tf-mMnMD61ogGNWxYPTrN_xKFOQdFGxC0uRqgS7koPIdYYhVDehZ7dN3P37XrzFGcwY5ir519Ky3H4BfuOgMEPzU92QqLeCTOqP-FIjkO6N750rXjqlYZaPdxAC8PPO31wFsp23p41WS5z416PeEY8rUDOnC7rNShDn00Yy2m9-FnzCDnMIo_bolPm-wwUKelSQCF33i44z8bZuF1QImKiRCa8i-sIyl3lEoCajb6YDQGf1BXpPLGzONPNrIdweiYo2Kr0mNkSGzAhOIdbEwfqcQDA6MPNishpPAPanX-9YL7AbTJpdpTOeyE0SRey6CEXaBkHTGBpAfj6xelX-4xzfiA7vCDz8ue572XzEVJEj9vcqWoeiHHHd3BRgS9KF2vWJ4bFhMJsZbZrn8KD-3flIAlOFlyiM5AGg%3D%3D)** **[A massive 3x matching opportunity, we need to reach our end of goal of $10,000--Donate now before the time runs out. Peter, we’re under a massive end of quarter deadline, and we’re in need of your immediate contribution if we want to surpass this goal. 2021 has shown the country what the left means by “a return to normalcy” and “reunification”. While we had our suspicions, they have been confirmed. Instead of calling out acting in moderation while trying to work across the aisle, Susan Wild and the far left has sided with our foreign enemies rather than our allies, slowed a growing economy, and instilled marxist values across the country. Peter, we can’t stand this sort of behavior anymore. It is not what our country needs and it is certainly not who we are as proud Americans. Lisa generously opened a 3x match opportunity in order to defeat Susan Wild next November, and we need to hit our goal of $10,000. With only a few days left, and about $5,500 raised, we can’t let this opportunity slide. While it’s ambitious, we believe with patriots like yourself, we will be able to make it happen. We simply cannot let Susan Wild and the Democrats stay in power any longer. America can’t take it. With their policy and rhetoric, America’s values, foreign policy, borders, and economy are crumbling right before our very eyes. Peter, Than you, Team Scheller \--------Forwarded Message Below------- Peter, What a ride 2021 has been. We are now halfway through the year and now one step closer to the November 2022 elections–all eyes will be on these races. Not only will these elections be monumental for our nation, but they are a great chance for our country to rebuke the radical left Susan Wild and her far left cronies for the ways they have shown their true colors, and it is time to finally vote them out of office. Instead of vying for the common sense policy our country needs, they keep trying to push our nation farther and farther left. Instead of capitalism , they have vouched for a government ruled economy. Instead of opening the country up as quickly as possible , they have tried to hold onto their power as long as possible. Instead of uniting the country on our founding principles , they have attempted to dismantle those principles in favor of anti-American rhetoric. Our country cannot take another two years of a Democrat-ruled House. If we do, the results could be cataclysmic. Make Susan Wild and her voting record bold & loud. We need leaders who work for the future and prosperity of our nation — not dark blue values. Susan Wild and her far left cronies are keen to hold onto power. But Peter, we simply can’t let them. Please, Peter, help me beat her so we can restore America back on its rightful path. Thank you, Lisa Scheller Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc.

name: Marco Lopez (D-AZ)
subject: I won't sugarcoat this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez
body:
what it takes to flip Arizona blue
| | |
---
There's no sugarcoating this, friend: Flipping Arizona blue was already going to be an uphill battle. But this news just made the climb even steeper.
**Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight rated our race for governor a "toss-up" – meaning this will be one of the tightest races in the country. ****And the GOP is planning to use every dirty trick they can to defeat us.**
Right now, failed GOP politicians like Doug Ducey and Kelli Ward are laser-focused on dismantling our democracy – from passing voter suppression bills to conducting a sham "election audit." They've even called in QAnon megaphones Marjorie Taylor Greene and Matt Gaetz to help spread baseless conspiracy theories and keep Arizona red.
We can't let that happen, friend. We have to do whatever it takes to defend our democracy – and that means flipping Arizona's governorship blue and taking back our state for the people.

**I'm not intimidated by the GOP's voter suppression tactics or the millions they'll spend to try and buy this seat. I know that if this team comes together and fights as hard as we can, our movement will be stronger than anything they can throw at us.**
But we still do have to fight – _hard_ – to flip this battleground state for the sake of all Arizonans' futures. **The only way we can stay on track and win this race is if we hit our end-of-quarter goal before the deadline, the biggest deadline we've faced as a team. But right now, we're falling dangerously short, and I need you with me.**
**[Right now, I'm counting on you to fuel this people-powered movement to take back our state. Please, will you rush $5 or more now to help us hit our end-of-quarter goal, defeat GOP extremism and flip Arizona blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31626300/293251094/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk123-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGRkMzI3Mi0yZWQ5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EQbdPzdLS7-GDdF66fRiHNwQBnUu87_xQQ0EUIpjPX8=)**

| Peter,

| Last year, **I called OUT Baltimore 's failed Democrat politicians**... telling them that our city will **no longer accept poverty, violence, and corruption.**

Now? **All of Baltimore is joining our fight.**

_37 small businesses_ have announced they will **unite together to WITHHOLD****tax payments** _until_ city leadership steps up to **STOP the spiraling crime** and violence.

We're proving it in Baltimore: when citizens feel EMPOWERED to take on the far-left machine, we can get real results.
