body:
If you donate before tomorrow at midnight, John and Gisele Fetterman could even give you a phone call to say Thank You...
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210629-1878-header&t=1&akid=1878%2E434096%2E_Np5Y6)
Hey! It’s Celeste, Political Director here at Fetterman for U.S. Senate.
I was at Pennsylvania’s Warren County Pride with John and Gisele this weekend, and they wanted me to make sure you got this message before the FEC fundraising deadline tomorrow at midnight:
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21594?refcode=em20210629-1878&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=1878%2E434096%2E_Np5Y6)
[**_Peter, can you please donate $10 or more to our campaign to help raise $100,000 in online donations before the FEC deadline on Wednesday, June 30? If you donate before tomorrow at midnight, John and Gisele Fetterman could even give you a phone call to say Thank You!_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21594?refcode=em20210629-1878&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=1878%2E434096%2E_Np5Y6)
**[Contribute $10](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21594?refcode=em20210629-1878&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=1878%2E434096%2E_Np5Y6)**
TBH, if a couple dozen folks from your state donate just $10 today, I think we’ll hit our goal!
Please keep in mind, the reason online fundraising through emails like this one is so important is because we’re a true people-powered campaign. Pennsylvanians, not corporate PACs.
On day one of this campaign, John pledged to never take a *single dime* from corporate PACs. We just believe it’s the right thing for our democracy, plus it allows Peter Willis to make a personal stake in this primary.
[**_That’s why every last donation toward our end-of-quarter FEC fundraising goal of $100,000 is so important for the success of our campaign. Can you please chip in $10 or more now?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21594?refcode=em20210629-1878&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=1878%2E434096%2E_Np5Y6)

Thank you. 🙏
Celeste
Celeste Trusty
Political Director
John Fetterman for U.S. Senate

name: Donna Imam
subject: Texas Republicans are shameless. Here's how we stop them.
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31627220/293253378/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjU1Yjc1Mi0zMWQ5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q6szDvGWICmrHaSZdYGG86BDlE9o5Bv6ZN4t8t-gi3k=) Friend --

Texas has been in the national spotlight a lot recently -- and for all the wrong reasons. In 2020, our state saw its highest voter turnout ever. So naturally, the GOP responded with one of the worst voter suppression bills in the country.

**You may have heard of one of those bills -- Senate Bill 7 (SB7).** If passed, it would significantly reduce the number of polling locations in high-density underserved communities. The GOP knows that the Texas population grew by over 2 million largely due to population increases in Latino, Hispanic, and Asian communities, and they are doing everything possible to stop Texas from flipping blue.

**If we don't overcome these fundamental challenges to our democracy, then we can't make the progress we need on meaningful issues like equal justice, student loan debt, homelessness, and health care.**

I'm running for Congress to deliver on these issues, but with the GOP voter suppression machine in full force, it's going to take hard organizing and a groundswell of local support to flip this seat. That's why I've announced my campaign early, and it's why I'm asking for your support:

**[Will you send in a contribution of $3 today to help launch our grassroots campaign with strength? We're still $13,179 short of reaching our $25,000 launch goal, and any amount you contribute helps us meet the mark.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31627221/293253379/73064796?refcode=em-06292021-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjU1Yjc1Mi0zMWQ5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q6szDvGWICmrHaSZdYGG86BDlE9o5Bv6ZN4t8t-gi3k=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31627222/293253380/73064796?refcode=em-06292021-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjU1Yjc1Mi0zMWQ5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q6szDvGWICmrHaSZdYGG86BDlE9o5Bv6ZN4t8t-gi3k=)

clean_body: | = Friend -- Texas has been in the national spotlight a lot recently -- and for all the wrong reasons. In 2020, our state saw its highest voter turnout ever. So naturally, the GOP responded with one of the worst voter suppression bills in the country. You may have heard of one of those bills -- Senate Bill 7 (SB7). If passed, it would significantly reduce the number of polling locations in high-density underserved communities. The GOP knows that the Texas population grew by over 2 million largely due to population increases in Latino, Hispanic, and Asian communities, and they are doing everything possible to stop Texas from flipping blue. If we don't overcome these fundamental challenges to our democracy, then we can't make the progress we need on meaningful issues like equal justice, student loan debt, homelessness, and health care. I'm running for Congress to deliver on these issues, but with the GOP voter suppression machine in full force, it's going to take hard organizing and a groundswell of local support to flip this seat. That's why I've announced my campaign early, and it's why I'm asking for your support: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Last election, a lot of pundits and so-called experts had us written off. They said that we don't have what it takes to flip this state blue. I can tell you from firsthand experience, they're absolutely wrong. We mobilized this community around the issues, and we brought underserved communities back into the fold by knocking on over 50,000 doors. With an intentional strategy, we can do it again. But we must account for the GOP's tactics. That's why your early support is so important. = Thanks in advance, Donna Imam = | = Donna Imam is a computer engineer running to flip Texas from red to blue. #

Hi friends — we have some good news and some bad news.
**The bad news is** we are still a little short on the progress to our 25,000 donation goal. About 2,153 donations to be exact and we really can’t afford to fall short this month.
**The good news is** there’s still time to make up for lost ground! We know that this team can show up and chip in $5 or $10 at a time, and still go up against the NRA and win.
Our end of quarter fundraising deadline ends tomorrow at midnight, and the vote on universal background checks could come up in the Senate soon. Timing is critical. Which is why we have to ask:
[**If you are able, will you make a $3 donation today to help us hit our 25,000 donation FEC fundraising goal? subject: Josh Weil for Senate - Newsletter
body:
Issue: 004 Tuesday, June 29, 2021 | It has been an incredible summer so far for this campaign. Over the past four weeks I have attended loca
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/29NfOmUsp/c?w=tppi04xOcOOn2EflbA76rZhilaEpKjO2uR8R_nhcApE.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zaG91dG91dC53aXguY29tL3NvLzI5TmZPbVVzcD9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6Ijg5ZmI1NTQ5LTQ5MzQtNGM0OS1iZDRmLTRhZWEyZTg2MzgxNiJ9)_**
---
| | |
---
| | Josh Weil for Senate - Newsletter
---
| |
---
| | Issue: 004 Tuesday, June 29, 2021
---
|
---
| | It has been an incredible summer so far for this campaign. Over the past four weeks I have attended local events, campaign events, and meetings with political organizers in 14 different counties, from Jacksonville to Miami, and coming up we've got three days in the panhandle ahead of us. The conversations I've had with all of you, those who I am fortunate enough to meet on all of our stops, continue to be the highpoints of this campaign. Real conversations with Floridians, from every background and every way of life, and I promise you, these are not empty conversations. I bring those notes I'm taking back home, and we go over them in our policy meetings. Your concerns influence our platform, they make us aware of the needs that must be addressed, and they help make this an even stronger campaign FOR THE PEOPLE! For that, I thank you!
---
|
---
| | IN REVIEW Where to begin? June has been extensive. It was my pleasure to speak at virtual meetings with the Miami Beach Democratic Club, Ponte Vedra Democratic Club, and Progressive Manatee. I attended Pride events in Delray Beach, St. Pete, Sebring, and Sarasota. I met with members of the local NAACP in Jacksonville, and community organizers both in and out of the Islamic community in Miami. We had a tent at the Eatonville Juneteenth Celebration, where I was invited on stage to address the entire crowd, and had the opportunity to stress the importance of supporting Progressive candidates up and down the ballot. I attended Tea & Conversation in East Tampa, and was invited back for the 15th Anniversary Celebration of the Black Business Bus Tour, which was truly inspiring. I attended in-person events with Democrats in Flagler Beach and Palatka, met with the Islamic community in Ocala, and held our own Meet & Greet at a wonderful local business in St. Augustine. None of this would have been possible without the support of our amazing donors, and the incredibly welcoming people we've met every step of the way. Again, I have so many reasons to say "Thank you" to you all.
---
| |
---
| | WHAT'S NEXT This weekend we'll be in the Panhandle, from July 2-4th, where we'll be meeting as many people as we can in Escambia, Santa Rosa, Okaloosa, Walton, Bay, and Calhoun counties. After that I've gotta race back to Orlando for a friend's wedding on July 5th, and then it's meetings, events, and canvassing in Jefferson County, Broward County, Sarasota, Bradenton, St. Pete, Immokalee, and the Villages, all leading up to our big trip to Washington D.C. for the March for Medicare for All on July 24th! The other big news is that we are filming our first 30 second, TV ready ad, this week. It's a huge step for us, and we can't wait for you to see it. Keep an eye out on social media, we'll be doing a countdown in the days leading up to the release, and we're asking everyone to share it every which way they can, once it drops. Finally, we are in the last hours of Quarter 2, with a big FEC filing coming in the days to follow. We are always grateful for your support, but right now is the most important ask we've made, yet. The production of the ad, the marketing that follows, getting literature out to all 67 counties, the overnights in the Panhandle and D.C., these are all only possible with your support. We have the strongest legion of small donor supporters, and I am incredibly proud of that. The people who look at these things understand the value of less money from more donors, and we want that donor number to be as high as possible. If you haven't contributed yet, now is the time. Every dollar counts, and every new donor shows the world how strong a grassroots progressive campaign in Florida can be. clean_body: Issue: 004 Tuesday, June 29, 2021 | It has been an incredible summer so far for this campaign. Over the past four weeks I have attended loca | | Can't see this message? | | | | | Josh Weil for Senate - Newsletter | | | | Issue: 004 Tuesday, June 29, 2021 | | | It has been an incredible summer so far for this campaign. Over the past four weeks I have attended local events, campaign events, and meetings with political organizers in 14 different counties, from Jacksonville to Miami, and coming up we've got three days in the panhandle ahead of us. The conversations I've had with all of you, those who I am fortunate enough to meet on all of our stops, continue to be the highpoints of this campaign. Real conversations with Floridians, from every background and every way of life, and I promise you, these are not empty conversations. I bring those notes I'm taking back home, and we go over them in our policy meetings. Your concerns influence our platform, they make us aware of the needs that must be addressed, and they help make this an even stronger campaign FOR THE PEOPLE! For that, I thank you! | | | IN REVIEW Where to begin? June has been extensive. It was my pleasure to speak at virtual meetings with the Miami Beach Democratic Club, Ponte Vedra Democratic Club, and Progressive Manatee. I attended Pride events in Delray Beach, St. Pete, Sebring, and Sarasota. I met with members of the local NAACP in Jacksonville, and community organizers both in and out of the Islamic community in Miami. We had a tent at the Eatonville Juneteenth Celebration, where I was invited on stage to address the entire crowd, and had the opportunity to stress the importance of supporting Progressive candidates up and down the ballot. I attended Tea & Conversation in East Tampa, and was invited back for the 15th Anniversary Celebration of the Black Business Bus Tour, which was truly inspiring. I attended in-person events with Democrats in Flagler Beach and Palatka, met with the Islamic community in Ocala, and held our own Meet & Greet at a wonderful local business in St. Augustine. None of this would have been possible without the support of our amazing donors, and the incredibly welcoming people we've met every step of the way. Again, I have so many reasons to say "Thank you" to you all. | | | | WHAT'S NEXT This weekend we'll be in the Panhandle, from July 2-4th, where we'll be meeting as many people as we can in Escambia, Santa Rosa, Okaloosa, Walton, Bay, and Calhoun counties. After that I've gotta race back to Orlando for a friend's wedding on July 5th, and then it's meetings, events, and canvassing in Jefferson County, Broward County, Sarasota, Bradenton, St. Pete, Immokalee, and the Villages, all leading up to our big trip to Washington D.C. for the March for Medicare for All on July 24th! The other big news is that we are filming our first 30 second, TV ready ad, this week. It's a huge step for us, and we can't wait for you to see it. Keep an eye out on social media, we'll be doing a countdown in the days leading up to the release, and we're asking everyone to share it every which way they can, once it drops. Finally, we are in the last hours of Quarter 2, with a big FEC filing coming in the days to follow. We are always grateful for your support, but right now is the most important ask we've made, yet. The production of the ad, the marketing that follows, getting literature out to all 67 counties, the overnights in the Panhandle and D.C., these are all only possible with your support. We have the strongest legion of small donor supporters, and I am incredibly proud of that. The people who look at these things understand the value of less money from more donors, and we want that donor number to be as high as possible. If you haven't contributed yet, now is the time. Every dollar counts, and every new donor shows the world how strong a grassroots progressive campaign in Florida can be. . | | | | I appreciate you all, and everything you have done for us so far, and everything you are going to do in the months to come. Thank you so much for being a part of this historic campaign, and I can't wait to serve you as your next U.S. Senator!! | | | | | | | | | Follow Us | | | | | Share on social | | Created with | | | You've received this email because you are a subscriber of . This Independence Day weekend, the NHGOP is teaming up with local committees to rally against radical Democrat rhetoric to 'Defund' our local police!

name: Kim Bretches
subject: You're the only one I can ask for help
body:
Dear Fellow American, This is the toughest letter I’ve ever had to write. I know that we’ve never met, but that is a picture of me and my husband, Chance, so you at least know what we look like. Chance is an officer in the Austin, TX Police Department – APD for short. As the wife of a law enforcement officer, I understand that my husband is often put in life-threatening situations on the job. [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c7a77ef7d901475baf19ee7817798c73&_e=rQh_Fx7k48iCU-Hq0yNq_1CpnjXRoWygzd_4a-DtFMKqpjUCBisCk6n0dkjmnxu1WhOWH8f2RKNxqxNuHFOw5LBoiRJJrPfFhgeNXfxeflST64q0_Mum9fQ-q7HQcSHCXyXk3dLkIAHipM9qYMM7MrLdORgN9ur4ocyF_0E6pVJB8dQysn6PmX5_SyR2oCk39THeye-8BRZLXxmCfcucbJ0NsyMHplV1Ke4wxKDfsYAwghcp5W4sB2uy73tuGaFjs3NEzUeBGin7yOh8UKmzZDsucp7KXqaqlIDDO5BrE9WIOMnYWxMy8b9WxInaMBe0AZg0KKcOZafRDNflMW68g7oaULZc5761N6mWsP5zP5WyG43pRV9sOK6ozhzR3Aa5OzUMj3SIkz-MjKxnLiNczCVoiCdtSDokSVmXuhMEfhFjwV3E_PEvGtl8GtoV8zrP) But what I never expected is for him to be threatened with a lifetime prison sentence for doing his job and taking convicted drug dealers off the street. [**Now, I have no choice but to ask complete strangers for help in keeping my husband out of prison for a crime he’s completely innocent of.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c7a77ef7d901475baf19ee7817798c73&_e=rQh_Fx7k48iCU-Hq0yNq_1CpnjXRoWygzd_4a-DtFMKqpjUCBisCk6n0dkjmnxu1WhOWH8f2RKNxqxNuHFOw5LBoiRJJrPfFhgeNXfxeflST64q0_Mum9fQ-q7HQcSHCXyXk3dLkIAHipM9qYMM7MrLdORgN9ur4ocyF_0E6pVJB8dQysn6PmX5_SyR2oCk39THeye-8BRZLXxmCfcucbJ9jqmHvb2W7nzo9Z4OVzvR4cbVQKgeB1wYOLboO1mHD2fYE0qftVf_MeSmbR8lzW3nykWWKy7f05PltqkrqeuSju9WiYb9EINrvsekuZaL0w5vQS-ldo7ctH95Lva82s9UM2x7XG1xa7x15v1zxBbA8IWc5DJww3w7ThCpw3aHsyftkknUpr-PdtrP7ny0bxYxuA_RDreO719TE_wGGA4AQ0Djb_aXOVVEvn_s_EQHS) Please let me explain. It all started on the evening of March 28th, 2019. My husband Chance – and his partner Officer Gregory Gentry – were assigned to the Street Narcotics Unit of the Austin Police Department. That day, they were tasked with conducting a special narcotic operation in a dangerous part of town where there was a high level of violent crime. _In fact, there was a shooting in the same small apartment complex just the night before. _ As Chance and his partner approached the apartment courtyard to arrest two well-known drug dealers, they knew that they had to move quickly and effectively to avoid being hurt or killed. When they got into the apartment courtyard, one of the suspects immediately submitted to arrest and was taken into custody. **But the other suspect – a man named Paul Mannie – didn’t go down easily.** Chance repeatedly yelled at Mannie to put his hands up and get on the ground – but Mannie ignored all his orders. After a struggle, Mannie was forced on the ground so that he could be handcuffed. Then, as Chance tried to put Mannie in handcuffs, Mannie got one of his hands free and reached toward his front waistline. As an eight-year veteran of the Austin Police Department, my husband had been in plenty of these kinds of situations before. So when Mannie reached his hand underneath his body, Chance and the other officers were worried that he was reaching for a weapon. The officers had no choice but use advanced physical force to neutralize the threat. And after nearly a minute long altercation, Chance finally got Mannie in handcuffs. When Chance got home later that night and told me the story, all I could do was thank God that he made it home safely. _I’ve seen so many tragic headlines in the news lately about officers getting killed – and I was just thankful that Chance wasn’t one of them._ But what I didn’t know at the time was that the worst was yet to come. Chance and Greg’s actions were cleared by the Austin Police Department’s Executive Management, the Internal Affairs Division, the Criminal Special Investigations Unit, the Force Review Board, the independent Office of Police Oversight, and the-then District Attorney. However, two years later, after a new “progressive” activist District Attorney was elected, Chance and Greg were charged with aggravated assault - a felony that is punishable by life in prison. My husband did nothing wrong. He followed his training and protocols and successfully took down two convicted drug dealers. And if he’s wrongfully convicted, he’ll miss our wedding anniversaries, our children’s birthdays, and our home will be left without the father and husband we love. I’d do anything to help Chance. But our family just doesn’t have the kind of money it takes to stand up to a prosecutor who is determined to put an innocent police officer behind bars. That’s why it felt like a God-send when Jason Johnson from the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund called us to offer their help. Not only did the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves – they’re also trying to raise money to pay for the best attorneys and expert witnesses. And that’s why I’m reaching out to you today. As a non-profit organization, they depend entirely on the generosity of folks like you to defend officers like Chance. So, I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone. [**Will you help my husband avoid being wrongfully convicted by making a tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the LELDF today?**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c7a77ef7d901475baf19ee7817798c73&_e=rQh_Fx7k48iCU-Hq0yNq_1CpnjXRoWygzd_4a-DtFMKqpjUCBisCk6n0dkjmnxu1WhOWH8f2RKNxqxNuHFOw5LBoiRJJrPfFhgeNXfxeflST64q0_Mum9fQ-q7HQcSHCXyXk3dLkIAHipM9qYMM7MrLdORgN9ur4ocyF_0E6pVJB8dQysn6PmX5_SyR2oCk39THeye-8BRZLXxmCfcucbGW5q9Nuw7_mJPquo5fg4XsjZ-tBrIvpPUmw9rNrbWmWNDPsU6ti3D5_QUMcdcM1EjPct_qfL9czEVFvm1keyVphNa9nCvPjfhJ_r2ETe32X9DntCH_kJ1oN14eE8aMCUuT0qm4bXPp0Sv8aWKtFM_J0c89bDEqlT5x1MSeyfX7zYP9Dk0iWtva2fgxFdMRa2V4jwczl1FnrmsMF5aTt8Xgc37BoGoeIkHexi6XSE3KB) Chance and I had just started dating when he started the academy. And I was so proud to be dating a future police officer. But after he graduated, I started to become nervous when he would leave for work. _If your loved ones have ever served in law enforcement, you probably know the feeling._ _ _ While I understand that any day can be the last for anyone, the thought is always in the back of my mind when I kiss him goodbye before each shift. Being an officer or being their immediate family is truly a sacrifice. My husband has missed countless special occasions and holidays to serve and protect his community. But now, I’m worried that he’ll miss our children’s entire childhoods if he’s wrongfully convicted and put behind bars. [**So if you are able, would you please consider sending a gift of $25, $35, $50 or more to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund to help Chance?**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c7a77ef7d901475baf19ee7817798c73&_e=rQh_Fx7k48iCU-Hq0yNq_1CpnjXRoWygzd_4a-DtFMKqpjUCBisCk6n0dkjmnxu1WhOWH8f2RKNxqxNuHFOw5LBoiRJJrPfFhgeNXfxeflST64q0_Mum9fQ-q7HQcSHCXyXk3dLkIAHipM9qYMM7MrLdORgN9ur4ocyF_0E6pVJB8dQysn6PmX5_SyR2oCk39THeye-8BRZLXxmCfcucbMLJdGfwtlbN4s8xK4_eOW8j7N4CM2MLChF7pmvJ3xCTqMgMqGv-VS4cVnuDvi_mX3NAay4Tmeq0Wa6pK2hqeyd-pIWieJJhMQqHWYTqofP4SEBwpAdhQAZs5R50jXtoXzVxCy3fcaLkDDwd_ZdF9QtdLZycwAx-Q8WpkemLabVzXIh5W2gxiIZVbocMPGVmxmJ8ITzYTXXgu91zcfuTMHkBkDG0-9NtPEVjD2-d3L35) Chance and I – and our two kids – can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind neighbors like you. So thank you for reading my letter. And thank you – in advance – on behalf of the families of wrongly-accused police officers being helped by LELDF. Sincerely, Kim Bretches [**Please support the LELDF today! **](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c7a77ef7d901475baf19ee7817798c73&_e=rQh_Fx7k48iCU-Hq0yNq_1CpnjXRoWygzd_4a-DtFMKqpjUCBisCk6n0dkjmnxu1WhOWH8f2RKNxqxNuHFOw5LBoiRJJrPfFhgeNXfxeflST64q0_Mum9fQ-q7HQcSHCXyXk3dLkIAHipM9qYMM7MrLdORgN9ur4ocyF_0E6pVJB8dQysn6PmX5_SyR2oCk39THeye-8BRZLXxmCfcucbPIFNcQ5Y0k2e4WpTQDn1ViI2FiG11soNjSZOxHtopGmZ74cg2MsRg0OhXbP9ks18CvIakfLVZfiq-2y0vIc-Uy3rMMx6Tgps5n0oEV5gcdq1WTdJd5FjN2zR7GxUS9L7cJhC_z4SM0y0NAs3h2LJzI4Wsl_8KDxhYcHqhRrbLdt5s_TD39_w7gYHd2nzSTVify0YcSiyL85Kgnu2hnxDPyUK4glYXLXmKUSlvoLdRTm) More such officers, who sacrifice so much for all of us, will face similar fates unless you and we speak out. Please approach an officer the next time you see one and thank them for their service! Thank you so much for supporting the LELDF and these good men and women. Please see more about these and our other cases on clean_body: Dear Fellow American, This is the toughest letter I’ve ever had to write. I know that we’ve never met, but that is a picture of me and my husband, Chance, so you at least know what we look like. Chance is an officer in the Austin, TX Police Department – APD for short. As the wife of a law enforcement officer, I understand that my husband is often put in life-threatening situations on the job. But what I never expected is for him to be threatened with a lifetime prison sentence for doing his job and taking convicted drug dealers off the street. Please let me explain. It all started on the evening of March 28th, 2019. My husband Chance – and his partner Officer Gregory Gentry – were assigned to the Street Narcotics Unit of the Austin Police Department. That day, they were tasked with conducting a special narcotic operation in a dangerous part of town where there was a high level of violent crime. In fact, there was a shooting in the same small apartment complex just the night before. As Chance and his partner approached the apartment courtyard to arrest two well-known drug dealers, they knew that they had to move quickly and effectively to avoid being hurt or killed. When they got into the apartment courtyard, one of the suspects immediately submitted to arrest and was taken into custody. But the other suspect – a man named Paul Mannie – didn’t go down easily. Chance repeatedly yelled at Mannie to put his hands up and get on the ground – but Mannie ignored all his orders. After a struggle, Mannie was forced on the ground so that he could be handcuffed. Then, as Chance tried to put Mannie in handcuffs, Mannie got one of his hands free and reached toward his front waistline. As an eight-year veteran of the Austin Police Department, my husband had been in plenty of these kinds of situations before. So when Mannie reached his hand underneath his body, Chance and the other officers were worried that he was reaching for a weapon. The officers had no choice but use advanced physical force to neutralize the threat. And after nearly a minute long altercation, Chance finally got Mannie in handcuffs. When Chance got home later that night and told me the story, all I could do was thank God that he made it home safely. I’ve seen so many tragic headlines in the news lately about officers getting killed – and I was just thankful that Chance wasn’t one of them. But what I didn’t know at the time was that the worst was yet to come. Chance and Greg’s actions were cleared by the Austin Police Department’s Executive Management, the Internal Affairs Division, the Criminal Special Investigations Unit, the Force Review Board, the independent Office of Police Oversight, and the-then District Attorney. However, two years later, after a new “progressive” activist District Attorney was elected, Chance and Greg were charged with aggravated assault - a felony that is punishable by life in prison. My husband did nothing wrong. He followed his training and protocols and successfully took down two convicted drug dealers. And if he’s wrongfully convicted, he’ll miss our wedding anniversaries, our children’s birthdays, and our home will be left without the father and husband we love. I’d do anything to help Chance. But our family just doesn’t have the kind of money it takes to stand up to a prosecutor who is determined to put an innocent police officer behind bars. That’s why it felt like a God-send when Jason Johnson from the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund called us to offer their help. Not only did the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves – they’re also trying to raise money to pay for the best attorneys and expert witnesses. And that’s why I’m reaching out to you today. As a non-profit organization, they depend entirely on the generosity of folks like you to defend officers like Chance. So, I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone. Chance and I had just started dating when he started the academy. And I was so proud to be dating a future police officer. But after he graduated, I started to become nervous when he would leave for work. If your loved ones have ever served in law enforcement, you probably know the feeling. While I understand that any day can be the last for anyone, the thought is always in the back of my mind when I kiss him goodbye before each shift. Being an officer or being their immediate family is truly a sacrifice. My husband has missed countless special occasions and holidays to serve and protect his community. But now, I’m worried that he’ll miss our children’s entire childhoods if he’s wrongfully convicted and put behind bars. Chance and I – and our two kids – can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind neighbors like you. So thank you for reading my letter. And thank you – in advance – on behalf of the families of wrongly-accused police officers being helped by LELDF. Sincerely, Kim Bretches More such officers, who sacrifice so much for all of us, will face similar fates unless you and we speak out. Please approach an officer the next time you see one and thank them for their service! Thank you so much for supporting the LELDF and these good men and women. Please see more about these and our other cases on "" and remember -Blue Lives Matter! © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 | | | | ---|---|---

| Fellow Patriot,
Did you know YOUR TAX DOLLARS are funding the Left’s plot to brainwash and re-program young kinds with Marxist Critical Race Theory preaching that...
**...White students are oppressors and inherently racist, AND America is a hateful, racist country!?**
My name is Catalina Lauf, and I’m a pro-MAGA conservative candidate for Congress who served as an official in President Trump’s Administration.
**[And I’m writing today to humbly ask you to help me defeat weak-kneed, Never Trumper Adam Kinzinger with a generous gift of $25 or more.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=8e858b0230564ebbade49ddd6e0b6cb3&_e=MKlB6BP6jauA41FyBiNEj4dobvooj--U6nKOoo37ye1rKEjQ3jdhT7I9577BrJYR17NMMxKxPYGzl8bI8EbUl5Z0jGwNM-bsYYDP79ZvjSkkOWT8B6m9EUds4we1NlBCAzBJmjjS8d1uWe8UrzoprIWhhkuLWnOqrliP0NZvBsvGESJBfSD31igowgpexNQAUbA1Q7frpehOJga9B0excap59paMAGD4TXujrKw4H111qDDbn7i12_NnEby4rfr1x9vfQbKqnBM4Y791JQECmHNFPs4vYLzwHJ2N_EymPW6CwvlVnsIhdm6ncgK5vsC1OQ860qmPL4MQIBYscQdLXQ%3D%3D)**
_Your gift will help me reach my $250k End-of-Quarter goal by midnight on June 30th that’s crucial to making sure I keep pace with this Bill Gates-funded RINO!_
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=8e858b0230564ebbade49ddd6e0b6cb3&_e=MKlB6BP6jauA41FyBiNEj4dobvooj--U6nKOoo37ye1rKEjQ3jdhT7I9577BrJYR17NMMxKxPYGzl8bI8EbUl5Z0jGwNM-bsYYDP79ZvjSkkOWT8B6m9EUds4we1NlBCb6yDf4z7C-Ck0P3iX7VdXwaSYqgJJp5ecwWkIZ-vVMaJAA9uB6XAaZIwbAAUovZ3zRYzoWWlT_mRFZ1QQpUmq0JQFxShNqpnT5a8AVXyisL9JOsyD_sbE7J7tWiyAnZybB7l_-OsK2nspGqrsJuPumufb_60iNt-R1UPIGqTZOos0GckkTSsBvyJzhaqnD5g4qt9KPfwO14EQFszas_YBA%3D%3D)
Critical Race Theory’s most famous champion and celebrity is a race baiter named Ibram X. Kendi.
This far-Left extremist is calling for an “**anti-racist amendment** ” to the Constitution that would create a new federal **Department of Anti-Racism**.
But what’s far worse is this lunatic’s absurdly claims that terms such as “** _rationality_** ,” “** _hard work_** ,” and “** _personal responsibility_** ” ARE RACIST!
**Our only course of action is to fight them on every battlefront and WIN!**
**[So, I hope you’ll chip in a few bucks to help me deliver a devastating blow to the Never Trump movement by kicking their golden boy out of Congress!](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=8e858b0230564ebbade49ddd6e0b6cb3&_e=MKlB6BP6jauA41FyBiNEj4dobvooj--U6nKOoo37ye1rKEjQ3jdhT7I9577BrJYR17NMMxKxPYGzl8bI8EbUl5Z0jGwNM-bsYYDP79ZvjSkkOWT8B6m9EUds4we1NlBCiReSy17f3r-JTBsrLEMqVykphXuOELY_LFWkW464y8JvSBiDlZ1cjLIFBdiuKTwMzY8K_K6RHwIfNK0RfdvzG3IeMC3424KBhj7YRrCp9KRWEDV3L9TirrgxhIvWwRRA5SFDUu7vIzwIrgkOKLt2LtwG06jNByXXxh4MoFVQuFDiFn9wsRoUgHWeRRyUe-vAY1g49w_hNnj4HNK8tTsLRw%3D%3D)**
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=8e858b0230564ebbade49ddd6e0b6cb3&_e=MKlB6BP6jauA41FyBiNEj4dobvooj--U6nKOoo37ye1rKEjQ3jdhT7I9577BrJYR17NMMxKxPYGzl8bI8EbUl5Z0jGwNM-bsYYDP79ZvjSkkOWT8B6m9EUds4we1NlBCKs9vRzXM_gUZsEQwIQDY3oh14ISueCDSadOZLSzVCWOFvsOnUfRhQd52Dgalf9BihZgQfLUa3L7TfM5Np0dqQke4dUhzNFPM-GJE4Ojb9hDxnFnREGCkUhDUGh67Y1L5YLji-F-cgKo8xlN9QJ2HrpI3rD1wxPerdDDPIbVJudB1DrYSvNci7oQzW8GmBhh6IL-cJOJSTzcFRAiCCi37aw%3D%3D)
If you’ve never heard of Adam, he’s just like his pal Liz Cheney - a spineless coward and conservative traitor.
Just the other day, Adam attacked President Trump in an unhinged rant:
**_“President Trump called me a loser ... He’s the only loser in the mix ... He’s down there obsessing about the fact that he’s a loser. I’m sorry you’re a loser, but you lost.”_**
Well, I have a message for Adam: **You’ll find out who the real loser is when I pummel you at the polls and send you to early retirement!**
But I can’t win this fight by myself.
**[That’s why I hope you’ll support my campaign with a generous gift of $25, $50, $100 or more to help me takeout this Never Trump embarrassment.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=8e858b0230564ebbade49ddd6e0b6cb3&_e=MKlB6BP6jauA41FyBiNEj4dobvooj--U6nKOoo37ye1rKEjQ3jdhT7I9577BrJYR17NMMxKxPYGzl8bI8EbUl5Z0jGwNM-bsYYDP79ZvjSkkOWT8B6m9EUds4we1NlBCa5AtO9rrESHqsl7o-k_7IebYA3XKivbcbFRIAjgIsGN1yXhZLrlHK_dfPFc7-mxA18FM125OmPpUt_BiKEB-qz5r0J-J8Q1CVxVXH4TTkeO0kPQ_YU9BSGnl_lUqqCLwEQOeKo4n9CKWvsr1_zDx9r0WO11rXAqdy6Z89Tjg_FDN4eSDI2Hzn27mVc2ooAYg37ZTYnOY2dme3PFA1Qr8fg%3D%3D)**
_Remember, I’m counting on your support to help me reach my $250k June 30th End-of-Quarter goal and close the gap between me and my Bill Gates-funded Swamp Creature opponent!_
Thank you in advance for your generous support today!
Yours in the fight for liberty,
Catalina Lauf
Candidate for Congress [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=8e858b0230564ebbade49ddd6e0b6cb3&_e=MKlB6BP6jauA41FyBiNEj4dobvooj--U6nKOoo37ye1rKEjQ3jdhT7I9577BrJYR17NMMxKxPYGzl8bI8EbUl5Z0jGwNM-bsYYDP79ZvjSkkOWT8B6m9EUds4we1NlBCr63BgXQeLxY-DIXramxtXBzVZdE07GTFEk11YI7a2nQf7r5V9JHNMTtYatNgMn5z4eQvJOQ41hU2wPmCl5yk2cRBIz0lgr6bX_eGDRg_Tw7QqCELiS1cbSSpgO6QgyZlHNhOI2kfQOj4Z0olEAU3Vasrj4v3oy-liFoi_KYmliNQuMb_Gom-7PLoNWvxC_Sw5BhwQmnTnpWVSV4R6oNJNA%3D%3D)

body:
ICYMI: Must-read message from Kevin Hern >>>
Hey Peter, I’m Adam, Political Director here at Kevin Hern for Congress. I wanted to send a quick follow-up today, in case you didn’t see the must-read message Kevin sent out yesterday. _If you missed it, you can read it below._ The bottom line is we’re counting on every Team Hern supporter to help us reach our End-of-Quarter goal... and our deadline is TOMORROW! **Please support our fight for conservative common sense in Washington. ** **[Pitch in $5, $10, $25, or $50 today >>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/34c15a6a49916449/895a676d2820da88c3d6b838967d376c/34143)** The left is coming after Kevin, targeting him because he is an effective conservative lawmaker who’s working hard to expose the Democrats’ extreme and dangerous agenda. He’s offering REAL SOLUTIONS that will protect all our nation stands for... freedom, liberty, opportunity, and individual responsibility! **[Stand with Kevin today. Keep him working for us in Washington and support our work on the national stage to TAKE BACK THE HOUSE](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/34c15a6a49916449/10c0a24004f9ab34c3d6b838967d376c/34143)**. Adam Jones Political Director, Kevin Hern for Congress | |
---
From: Kevin Hern <info@hernforcongress.com>
Date: Monday, June 28, 2021 at 12:08 PM
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Subject: Leading the charge for CONSERVATIVE COMMON SENSE
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/34c15a6a49916449/60dd6c126ff16d08c3d6b838967d376c/34143)
Dear Peter,

I’m extremely concerned with the direction our nation is headed. I’m sure you are too, and for good reason.

Just over five months into the Biden-Harris era, we’re seeing CRISIS after CRISIS emerge.

The Biden Border Crisis rages on with no end in sight. Project and job-killing executive orders from this president have put our energy independence in jeopardy.

And Joe Biden is proposing a $6 TRILLION spending spree and hiking taxes to WWII levels... _as inflation is spiking and hitting ALL of us in the pocketbook!_

We can defeat this agenda. We can take back the House to stop it for good.

**But we will only succeed by standing STRONG and UNITED as Republicans, and put forth a vision and agenda to get our country back on track!**

[**Will you support our efforts at this critical time?**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/34c15a6a49916449/eee1bc8a514e7d48c3d6b838967d376c/34143)

The End-of-Quarter deadline is this Wednesday. It’s all hands on deck to reach our goal.
[**PITCH IN $100 >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/34c15a6a49916449/4612b233d4789bfcc3d6b838967d376c/34143)
[**PITCH IN $50 >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/34c15a6a49916449/c2f9e7ab3c798915c3d6b838967d376c/34143)
[**PITCH IN $35 >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/34c15a6a49916449/b201379160996085c3d6b838967d376c/34143)
[**PITCH IN $15 >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/34c15a6a49916449/ee28bd68d65b6cd6c3d6b838967d376c/34143)
[**PITCH IN $5 >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/34c15a6a49916449/da4c7764c6168a10c3d6b838967d376c/34143)
Our nation is at a crossroads. I’m proud to be among those fight-to-win Republicans in the House leading the charge for common sense conservative policies to empower the American people, NOT our federal government.

I’ve proposed a budget that is focused on balancing our spending in five years. It would tackle the MASSIVE wasteful spending that has help us back for far too long.

**We need CAN-DO proposals and action, Peter**.

_This is how we win over voters and WIN BIG in 2022, to move forward and get the job done to build a strong and secure American future!_

The left DOES NOT want this to happen. That makes me a political target of these folks, and we must be fully prepared for the fight ahead.

**[Please donate any amount today to sustain our fight this summer](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/34c15a6a49916449/17d5237de786de7ec3d6b838967d376c/34143)**.

Every donation is a big help, no matter the amount!

All the best,

Kevin Hern

We can take back the House to stop it for good. But we will only succeed by standing STRONG and UNITED as Republicans, and put forth a vision and agenda to get our country back on track! The End-of-Quarter deadline is this Wednesday. It’s all hands on deck to reach our goal. Our nation is at a crossroads. I’m proud to be among those fight-to-win Republicans in the House leading the charge for common sense conservative policies to empower the American people, NOT our federal government. I’ve proposed a budget that is focused on balancing our spending in five years. It would tackle the MASSIVE wasteful spending that has help us back for far too long. We need CAN-DO proposals and action, Peter. This is how we win over voters and WIN BIG in 2022, to move forward and get the job done to build a strong and secure American future! The left DOES NOT want this to happen. That makes me a political target of these folks, and we must be fully prepared for the fight ahead. . Every donation is a big help, no matter the amount! All the best, Kevin Hern | | ---|--- id:2021-04-26-17:31:49:364t Paid For By Hern For Congress

clean_body: We are less than 24 hours away from our most important FEC deadline and we need your support to close our fundraising gap. Hi Peter, Did you see my last email? In less than 24 hours, we will hit the FEC quarterly fundraising deadline. We are so close to our most important end-of-quarter deadline, but we are not close to meeting our goal. Our #momsquad worked hard and raised thousands of dollars for Katie Porter this quarter, but we are still $2,541 dollars away from our goal. That's why I am reaching out to you today, Peter. We have crunched the numbers and with your support, we can close our fundraising gap by our end-of-quarter deadline tomorrow. = Here is why your support is crucial. The GOP is raising massive amounts of money to flip this seat next year. Today, Katie's seat and our House majority could not be more vulnerable. = It is up to us to have Katie's back in this critical moment and show the strength and momentum of our movement behind her. The National Republican Campaign Committee is getting seven figure checks from Trump donors and from pro-Trump PACs to win back the House. = Thank you for all of your support! Simona Grace #mominchief Founder and Executive Director Moms in Office = | | | | ---|---|--- Moms in Office 13351 Riverside Drive #265 Sherman Oaks, CA 91423 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . body:
Here’s where we’re at:
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210629-2253-header&t=1&akid=2253%2E2526796%2Ek1jTeK)
106,617
That’s how many contributions we need to reach before tomorrow at midnight when we’ll close our books and submit our fundraising numbers to the public.
**How did we get that number?** Based off of our average donation, we need to raise 106,617 contributions this quarter to hit our target of $2 million.
106,617 is an important number to us because each donation – no matter the amount – shows that our values from Medicare for All to the Green New Deal have strong support in your state and across the country.
Here’s where we’re at:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210629-2?refcode=em20210629-2253-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2253_2526796_k1jTeK&akid=2253%2E2526796%2Ek1jTeK)
[Can you be one of the 13,533 people we need to chip in in the next 36 hours to meet our goal and allow us to carry out all the programs Alexandria has planned?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210629-2?refcode=em20210629-2253-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&refcode2=2253_2526796_k1jTeK&akid=2253%2E2526796%2Ek1jTeK)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210629-2?refcode=em20210629-2253-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2253_2526796_k1jTeK&akid=2253%2E2526796%2Ek1jTeK)**
This goal is particularly important. After midnight tomorrow, our numbers will be submitted to the FEC where they’ll be available to the public and examined by pundits and our opponents to determine the strength of our movement.
**Alexandria is one of the most heavily targeted members of Congress.** Even as super PACs are spending tens of thousands of dollars right now on an attack campaign against Alexandria and Republicans are busy playing political games and spreading disinformation – we're staying focused on the issues that matter.
A strong FEC report at this moment would help demonstrate how much grassroots support Alexandria has beside her.
**[Each donation we receive directly translates into growing our movement, so please – if you’re able – will you pitch in any amount to help us reach our goal?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210629-2?refcode=em20210629-2253-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&refcode2=2253_2526796_k1jTeK&akid=2253%2E2526796%2Ek1jTeK)**
Thank you for making all of this possible.
Team AOC

James,

Kamala Harris is trying to get us to believe that Biden’s Border Crisis isn’t really a crisis at all and that things are just peachy down at our southern border.

But we know better than to believe her lies, especially since she REFUSED to visit the border and size up the situation for three full months after being put in charge.

Here’s a look at what the VP isn’t telling us about the situation at our border:
* _Fentanyl seizures have tripled since this time last year._
* _The number of migrants flooding into the country reached a 20-year high last month._
* _The government is renting out entire hotels to have a place to put all those people, using our tax dollars to foot the bill._
* _Coyotes are making a fortune smuggling drugs and people across our lax border._

**The Left’s free-for-all open border policies are putting our communities and our economy at risk, and it will only get worse the longer Kamala continues to turn a blind eye and lie about the scope of the crisis. It’s about time our leaders in Washington do something about it.**

Harold Earls knows this crisis isn’t just a problem for border communities, it’s impacting families all across America. That’s why he’s on a mission to end Biden’s Border Crisis once he makes it to Congress.

**And James, YOU can help him get there.**

[**Chip in and help send Harold to Congress so he can crack down on the Left’s dangerous open border policies. >>>**](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=1ac3668e405b44fc8c5426ae95f446d9&_e=pIJr4E9IJs5fvqq7iU0cbZa8hlbeKfh25fUWmf6OO6Tx65_qvzhowGsG6AEHOQGQYnA9L7Oea-VKdcsOELxIFKQjcwu067WoyCXAoeCNXAnKJZ7EravnXe-XjXM3rUyz3arW0HJKMOwG1HCZ8OvXa8WMB8N-LWjsuUn72DPZZo_6du2kpG8d7mh2_PgbGptXMmDlB37hExJOvuQ9LbF2SGLADSZNZebnOu2b42NRoiKwnff8RiorhL9A0ahXxHdENNsFxkysPPgz0c53Nq9LyTNbMc7lqY0J-VL8FNSdJN4gTsIpDj45uf_eYladIvZoZRrYigAju7pNsMSIr4KqCSx-oVyXJ7hS2HNAGxURsHU6ay_QNkna8479a8G4aXWrsiiVwfhbjcdNQr0lWsWwpSLRHzlSkmeDwZ5P7mM3pzHerE0TFBxyu548Rw3k6yvMb2wcFajSudoEp2WInIetCzZkN0WwGde1MtUIERduxt-SKrI6jUjU6Gk6EtRLwhpW)

But we know better than to believe her lies, especially since she REFUSED to visit the border and size up the situation for three full months after being put in charge. Here’s a look at what the VP isn’t telling us about the situation at our border: Fentanyl seizures have tripled since this time last year. The number of migrants flooding into the country reached a 20-year high last month. The government is renting out entire hotels to have a place to put all those people, using our tax dollars to foot the bill. Coyotes are making a fortune smuggling drugs and people across our lax border. The Left’s free-for-all open border policies are putting our communities and our economy at risk, and it will only get worse the longer Kamala continues to turn a blind eye and lie about the scope of the crisis. It’s about time our leaders in Washington do something about it. Harold Earls knows this crisis isn’t just a problem for border communities, it’s impacting families all across America. name: MarkKelly.com
subject: We are legally required to submit our fundraising numbers after our deadline tomorrow at midnight. Will you chip in anything you can afford before then?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
Tomorrow is our June FEC fundraising deadline, and at midnight we are legally required to report our fundraising numbers, so we need a surge of support today to help us stay on track to hit our 100,000 contribution goal.
It’s crucial we hit this goal because this week, One Nation, a Mitch McConnell-backed Super PAC, just dropped another $1 MILLION on ads attacking Mark. It’s the latest sign they aren’t slowing down their spending against us heading into 2022.
So we need to keep up the pace in order to fight back against this latest attack and we haven’t brought in as many contributions as we’d hoped so far today.
So we need you to become a new supporter to help us get one step closer to hitting our goal.
Normally most first time contributors chip in $5. If you would consider contributing $10 we’ll be where we need to be to hit our goal so we can keep Mark in the Senate.
[**So what do you say? Can you make a $10 donation towards our public FEC fundraising deadline? We only have a few hours left to hit this goal and anything you can afford to give will go a long way towards helping Mark hold this seat.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?refcode=em210629-2-15&t=1&refcode2=886_6688874__3khAJ&akid=886%2E6688874%2E_3khAJ)
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?refcode=em210629-2-15&t=2&refcode2=886_6688874__3khAJ&akid=886%2E6688874%2E_3khAJ)**
With everyone pitching in just a little more, we’ll hit our goal and be ready for whatever Mitch McConnell’s allies throws at us next. So thank you in advance for chipping in!
All our best,
Team Kelly
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?refcode=em210629-2-15&t=3&refcode2=886_6688874__3khAJ&akid=886%2E6688874%2E_3khAJ)**

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Not a dime of corporate PAC money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
I'll get straight to it, Peter:
**Right now, we're still quite a bit short of where we want to be for our FEC deadline goal of $150,000.** With so much on the line in the coming weeks and months — on a bold infrastructure, jobs, and families plan, a wealth tax, Medicare expansion, and more — it's incredibly imperative that we reach our target by midnight tomorrow. We can't risk falling short.
**I wouldn't reach out to ask for your help today if grassroots contributions weren't so important to our movement.** The money raised from emails like the one you're reading right now helps keep me in Congress fighting for social, economic, racial, and environmental justice — in addition to organizing and building a powerful movement that helps us accomplish these priorities.
[**I don't take a dime of corporate PAC money — supporters like you truly are the beating heart of our movement. Can you donate $3 right now to help us hit our FEC deadline goal before midnight tomorrow?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210629?refcode=em20210629-419&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&refcode2=419_420207_zhyyXD&akid=419%2E420207%2EzhyyXD) _No matter the amount you can give, it makes a big difference._
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210629?refcode=em20210629-419&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=419_420207_zhyyXD&akid=419%2E420207%2EzhyyXD)**
Thank you, as always, for being a part of our people-first movement for bold and transformative change.
In solidarity,
Pramila
P.S. To show my gratitude, I'm planning on calling some of the supporters [**who**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210629?refcode=em20210629-419&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=419_420207_zhyyXD&akid=419%2E420207%2EzhyyXD)[**donate toward our FEC deadline goal**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210629?refcode=em20210629-419&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=419_420207_zhyyXD&akid=419%2E420207%2EzhyyXD) and saying thanks for everything you do. Don't ignore the unknown number calling you next month — it might just be me!

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210629-419-footer&t=23&refcode2=419_420207_zhyyXD&akid=419%2E420207%2EzhyyXD)**

subject: Tomorrow's deadline is a big one
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MOMS IN OFFICE
body:
We are 24 hours away from the FEC end of quarter deadline and this is a critical time for campaigns and organizations to meet their goal. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31632705/293288145/1322170159?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFlNzU4ZGE3LTRkZDktZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rUMB36cCgC2LIZ__Gc4oTvtO0lBI3YxwwhkKn7lUQc8=&emci=082ba680-03d9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=1e758da7-4dd9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=2884131) Hi Peter, In less than 24 hours, we will hit the FEC quarterly reporting deadline. This is a real deadline for campaigns and organizations supporting women and a critical test of their grassroots support. So, today I want to talk to you about the important work that Off the Sidelines and Moms in Office does to elect more women and moms to office. **[This is the absolute best time to split a donation to make sure PACs supporting women have the resouces that they need to win big in 2022.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31632706/293288146/322201856?refcode=0629&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFlNzU4ZGE3LTRkZDktZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rUMB36cCgC2LIZ__Gc4oTvtO0lBI3YxwwhkKn7lUQc8=)** Women candidates--particularly women with caregiving responsibilities-- face a unique set of challenges, biases and expectations when they step up to run for office. Organizations supporting women, like Off the Sidelines and Moms in Office, help to fill in the gaps by recruiting, mentoring and financially supporting women candidates for Congress. **[The FEC'S fundraising deadline is less than 24 hours away and anything that you can pitch in will make a difference. Can we count on you today to rush a donation before Wednesday’s deadline?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31632707/293288147/322201856?refcode=0629&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFlNzU4ZGE3LTRkZDktZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rUMB36cCgC2LIZ__Gc4oTvtO0lBI3YxwwhkKn7lUQc8=)** clean_body: We are 24 hours away from the FEC end of quarter deadline and this is a critical time for campaigns and organizations to meet their goal. Hi Peter, In less than 24 hours, we will hit the FEC quarterly reporting deadline. This is a real deadline for campaigns and organizations supporting women and a critical test of their grassroots support. So, today I want to talk to you about the important work that Off the Sidelines and Moms in Office does to elect more women and moms to office. = Women candidates--particularly women with caregiving responsibilities-- face a unique set of challenges, biases and expectations when they step up to run for office. Organizations supporting women, like Off the Sidelines and Moms in Office, help to fill in the gaps by recruiting, mentoring and financially supporting women candidates for Congress. = With more progressive women in office, we can make this country one that works for working moms and families alike. = I am so grateful for your support. -Kirsten = | | | | ---|---|--- Moms in Office 13351 Riverside Drive #265 Sherman Oaks, CA 91423 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . They want to distract you from our real issues with big talk, lots of unhelpful rhetoric, even violent outbursts! You might remember that radicals went as far as vandalizing my home last month to make a not-so-subtle point about a labor bill they didn’t like.

And it all distracts you from the Fauci emails, from the rising gas prices, from the dramatic side-effects of the liberal shutdowns, _and from the truth. _

It’s a huge problem and I’m working every day to change it. And with our JUNE END OF QUARTER deadline quickly approaching, I need your help.

People throughout the country are truly struggling and I can assure my colleagues - along with those who spray-painted all over my sidewalk - that this is not the way most Americans handle their problems.

Friend, can you check out my message below? | | | Earlier this week I launched an aggressive END OF QUARTER money bomb and I was hoping you’d make a contribution because we don't want the left or AOC, the media, or Antifa to win. With $25,000 to raise, we really need to be on top of it to meet our goals. We just can’t afford to sit this one out. Please, help us out if you can: Nancy Mace \-------forwarded message------- To: Subject: re: all this madness From: Nancy Mace END OF QUARTER DEADLINE: WEDNESDAY JUNE 30TH @ 11:59PM! Friend, radicals in Washington are up to the same old tricks. They want to distract you from our real issues with big talk, lots of unhelpful rhetoric, even violent outbursts! You might remember that radicals went as far as vandalizing my home last month to make a not-so-subtle point about a labor bill they didn’t like. And it all distracts you from the Fauci emails, from the rising gas prices, from the dramatic side-effects of the liberal shutdowns, and from the truth. It’s a huge problem and I’m working every day to change it. And with our JUNE END OF QUARTER deadline quickly approaching, I need your help. Friend, the path we’re on now is a dangerous one. We’re talking about a whole group of people encouraging violence against those they disagree with! It’s absolute madness, friend. It’s unAmerican. People throughout the country are truly struggling and I can assure my colleagues - along with those who spray-painted all over my sidewalk - that this is not the way most Americans handle their problems. Outside of the hyper-politicization in our self-obsessed political circles, Americans get to work and do what must be done to make ends meet for their families. Washington should be no different. If you ask me, it’s about time Washington got over itself and got to work for the people. If you agree, please chip in NOW before my END OF QUARTER deadline to help me make Washington work for YOU. | We only have a few days left to really make this count, so please rush in your MONEYBOMB donation as soon as you possibly can. Use this link to have your contribution counted immediately: Thank you, Nancy Mace | | | Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress | | 295 Seven Farms Drive C-186 Charleston, SC 29492 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: John Fetterman
subject: re: A call from a Pennsylvania number
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I'm not running for Senate for the political clout — and I'm sure as hell NOT running to have more opportunities to wear a suit. 🙄
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210629-1880-header&t=1&akid=1880%2E434096%2ExXgkEx)
**Thank you.**
👆That's the number one thing I want to tell every single person who's reading this email. _Yup, including you, Peter!_
In fact, Gisele + I would love to tell you over the phone how much we appreciate your dedicated support for this people-powered campaign — **so we really want to give you a personal phone call.**
After our quarterly deadline tomorrow, our finance team is going to send us over a master list of everyone who's chipped in ANY amount to help reach our $100,000 fundraising goal. I'd really hope to see your name on that list, Peter, so I've just gotta ask:
[**_Can I give you a quick phone call? Gisele and I would love to say thank you for being a part of this campaign to flip this crucial Senate seat, so please chip in your first $5 donation or anything you can before tomorrow at midnight._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21626?refcode=em20210629-1880&t=2&akid=1880%2E434096%2ExXgkEx)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21626?refcode=em20210629-1880&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=1880%2E434096%2ExXgkEx)**
Something you may (or may not) know about me is that I've never been very good at schmoozing with political elites or wealthy campaign donors. Gisele likes to tell people I'm secretly an introvert.
The truth is, I'd just rather be having casual, honest conversations with folks like you.
I'm not running for Senate for the political clout — and I'm sure as hell NOT running for more opportunities to wear a suit. 🙄 I'm running because I want to amplify voices like yours on the floor of the U.S. Senate.
Peter, I'm so incredibly proud and humbled that this campaign is being built from the grassroots up, one small-dollar donation at a time. So, I really would like to give you a phone call to tell you how truly grateful I am.
[**_What do you say? If you chip in $5 before our deadline tomorrow night, you might just get a call from Gisele and me. So, if you get a call from a Pennsylvania phone number, be sure to pick it up!_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21626?refcode=em20210629-1880&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fjf-email-20210629-3%3Frefcode%3Dem20210629-1880&t=22&akid=1880%2E434096%2ExXgkEx)
Talk soon,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
P.S. **Here's a photo from the last time Gisele and I decided to call a few of our grassroots donors.** Unsurprisingly, people are usually even *more* excited to hear from her... but it's kind of a package deal. [** _Anyway, I'd love to give you a call, Peter, so please chip in $5 if your budget allows._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21626?refcode=em20210629-1880&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fjf-email-20210629-3%3Frefcode%3Dem20210629-1880&t=23&akid=1880%2E434096%2ExXgkEx)
**_[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21626?refcode=em20210629-1880&t=24&akid=1880%2E434096%2ExXgkEx)_**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210629-1880-footer&t=25&refcode2=1880_434096_xXgkEx&akid=1880%2E434096%2ExXgkEx)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=26&akid=1880%2E434096%2ExXgkEx)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=1880%2E434096%2ExXgkEx)

That’s why, together, we’re fighting for smaller government, lower taxes, and more opportunities for Americans from Iowa to South Carolina and everywhere in between. This fight won’t be won easily and it won’t be won until Speaker Pelosi and Senate Majority Leader Schumer are defeated by a conservative majority in Congress. **If we don’t win, their trillion dollar socialist dreams will destroy a generation of opportunity**

name: Erica Smith
subject: Can I give you a phone call?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Here is your personal link to join my call list:
#
Can I give you a phone call?
I’m serious. We’re 24 hours away from our FEC filing deadline, when our finances will become public — and we’re 56 donations short of our end-of-quarter goal.
So, I’m going to do something special.
**If you make a donation of ANY amount to this email, I’ll give you a phone call during our Facebook Live tomorrow between 8:00PM-9:30PM ET.**
**Here is your personal link to join my call list:**
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-em202106-deadline?refcode=em20210629-dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/3615?refcode=em20210629-dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=1&akid=225%2E3698%2EZxthbu)
I know I've been emailing you about our end-of-quarter deadline. I wouldn't even be surprised if you told me that your inbox was chock-full of emails from other Democrats asking for money today.
But our campaign for U.S. Senate in North Carolina is different. We're truly building our moral movement for North Carolina one person at a time, one donation at a time.
**Every dollar that comes our way shows that you believe in me and our campaign, and that's why I want to show my gratitude by giving you a personal phone call.**
[**Make a contribution of any amount to our campaign, and I'll give you a personal phone call during tomorrow's Facebook Live to say thanks! Just click here to directly donate.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/3615?refcode=em20210629-dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=2&akid=225%2E3698%2EZxthbu)
Looking forward to speaking with you,
Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate
P.S. Join me and my campaign team tomorrow, Wednesday, June 30, between 8:00-9:30PM ET for a *special* end-of-quarter countdown on Facebook Live. **At the start of the event, click the button below to tune in:**
**[Tune in](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/3616?t=3&akid=225%2E3698%2EZxthbu)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210629-225-footer&t=4&refcode2=225_3698_Zxthbu&akid=225%2E3698%2EZxthbu)**

body:
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=af7120946d8b4da1857594472d860a12&_m=534daa40a89c4badb339f0ba61235150&_e=s3qblJMvh299JdjPOTnEYz24QIETB8kU7vhLyeFRUFwbueoxy5gUqF4ogD1ixTR3anj17ZQtLFYxwr-jQ0_fUnRYhNFFsJ3MbUqu_b-7ci_PZ27P6Gghr_ojjIHLJnwfDHStOPnDS9Ka0Q_88Ob4eVJZFqwrv_TFW2w1TUSY4C51GAqFkumNGN9QkvLOQIk4LZYrsAJMf59kIheBou3U831X6hxIHFy1sSpO8wBY0I_bRjbtngzQr2vFvoF4aCAQLmf6D6ZtcuU3gTewUvKeKlvGGGUOzyuytXWKV5IZYwK5pHDpugyeYOumNucCMMhw4jBCvMvz80ksnKEXUurnj7fYWSD_4vfILkOXZVp7IxN-31ZtmM74EIt8On7k5L7szGlFINWUsAjKSjj5o5yWw1hqUu1yyg7N0b28YsklcmPXzQt609gIB3b-1WBVXGdk1vtGoICZmJeXQHgoD38jFw%3D%3D) Fellow American, This first half of the year has been pretty tough. Within six months of the Democrats’ control, our borders are open and we are seeing illegal crossing increasing at alarming rates. Drug smugglers and human traffickers are crossing our borders every day and threatening the safety of you and your family. The problem just keeps getting worse– with no end in sight. President Trump was right when he said, “without borders, we don’t have a country.” If the illegal immigration problem has gotten this bad this quickly, I shudder to think at what a dangerous mess our country will be in another six months. **[Which is why I’m asking you for a gift of $35 or more today to help me reach my important end of quarter goal.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=af7120946d8b4da1857594472d860a12&_m=534daa40a89c4badb339f0ba61235150&_e=s3qblJMvh299JdjPOTnEYz24QIETB8kU7vhLyeFRUFwbueoxy5gUqF4ogD1ixTR3anj17ZQtLFYxwr-jQ0_fUnRYhNFFsJ3MbUqu_b-7ci_PZ27P6Gghr_ojjIHLJnwfDHStOPnDS9Ka0Q_88Ob4eVJZFqwrv_TFW2w1TUSY4C51GAqFkumNGN9QkvLOQIk4LZYrsAJMf59kIheBou3U831X6hxIHFy1sSpO8wBY0I_bRjbtngzQr2vFvoF4aCAQtj4uU3INE9KVg84HH1AQ5ucWMIKaPBFTWyOerGaDmuYB7gGiS-OLFwBMyK03_0gksv-AzfIk_8RhL0ituP0LdVB-zcD7RUX9VZoLO6OrTVjCAZLsUvx9lX9QM7QrgLFWvFjVn1r6mU-pQ7ah4RGQ1VqwSIISW3dGWsRNFqZm3fSS0OkF1o91UdadhjgNo3rVbF6Dc5DWMcl_eHBleG7NJA%3D%3D)** **Americans should always be put first.** [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=af7120946d8b4da1857594472d860a12&_m=534daa40a89c4badb339f0ba61235150&_e=s3qblJMvh299JdjPOTnEYz24QIETB8kU7vhLyeFRUFwbueoxy5gUqF4ogD1ixTR3anj17ZQtLFYxwr-jQ0_fUnRYhNFFsJ3MbUqu_b-7ci_PZ27P6Gghr_ojjIHLJnwfDHStOPnDS9Ka0Q_88Ob4eVJZFqwrv_TFW2w1TUSY4C51GAqFkumNGN9QkvLOQIk4LZYrsAJMf59kIheBou3U831X6hxIHFy1sSpO8wBY0I_bRjbtngzQr2vFvoF4aCAQLp2DCpjrR5VssEosvvUAkcOG3Ytaeck1VTYg8zbAkKN2NfPMlvDwxIZ0hWAwV0GPOMIexowRXuWc-9agL-2sdwUESQloafaHokRLVhspHLhxKebdvnfmtdfwN3LzvdB7n5-Z3LujvEzryMY53Md6BZdSLf6AyyQQPuZzmXVR5YMst74nYsr0QOvf38DyJ6ia8FMP7eX4qi6rYbfzRUalTg%3D%3D) >>**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=af7120946d8b4da1857594472d860a12&_m=534daa40a89c4badb339f0ba61235150&_e=s3qblJMvh299JdjPOTnEYz24QIETB8kU7vhLyeFRUFwbueoxy5gUqF4ogD1ixTR3anj17ZQtLFYxwr-jQ0_fUnRYhNFFsJ3MbUqu_b-7ci_PZ27P6Gghr_ojjIHLJnwfDHStOPnDS9Ka0Q_88Ob4eVJZFqwrv_TFW2w1TUSY4C51GAqFkumNGN9QkvLOQIk4LZYrsAJMf59kIheBou3U831X6hxIHFy1sSpO8wBY0I_bRjbtngzQr2vFvoF4aCAQKJyb2kctt0HWuIAYJ1mrkG9tCC3EX9Hge-CIjSnwx5EkseA7axjYJ0QItkguf5K_TAhhCGcH6iNAzCQlJvmEelqA6PoQec_LcUkvMbA3MFfko6WwU0p2gVl-VOQf1X-dE8QDRAezIpIT35AZRnsgkGUigvkH8dJgBBgxcR95MKT2NUDav-VFHXuTDfVA5PrOAJCEcAVgR00thfmTcfM2uQ%3D%3D) clean_body: Fellow American, This first half of the year has been pretty tough. Within six months of the Democrats’ control, our borders are open and we are seeing illegal crossing increasing at alarming rates. Drug smugglers and human traffickers are crossing our borders every day and threatening the safety of you and your family. The problem just keeps getting worse– with no end in sight. President Trump was right when he said, “without borders, we don’t have a country.” If the illegal immigration problem has gotten this bad this quickly, I shudder to think at what a dangerous mess our country will be in another six months. Americans should always be put first. And border states like Arizona are the hardest hit– all because the current administration does not see the full effects of this crisis. I’m committed to continue fighting against the liberal Democrats who care more about promoting their dangerous ideologies than the safety and freedoms of the people they were elected to protect. I’m convinced we can make the second half of 2021 even better than the first, and 2022 even better than that. We conservatives need to gear up for a long fight ahead. The radical Left is working at every turn, and they’re not letting up anytime soon. I’m going to need EVERY patriot on my side to defend our country – while we still have one! The time is now to make sure we build our base, so we win in 2022 and take back the majority. We don’t have a minute to spare. Let’s bring back 2021 for conservatives, and for Americans. clean_body: | | | | | NEWS: ELECT NEVADA DEMOCRATS LAUNCHES END-OF-QUARTER FUNDRAISING GOAL Deadline: 11:59PM on June 30 Goal: $25,000 Suggested Action for you: Did you hear about our end-of-quarter fundraising goal? We know it’s a lofty ask, but we know just how strong this team is, and we’re confident you all will step up to the plate. Nevada has become a KEY battleground for Democrats AND Republicans, and we’re sure to see millions of dollars pouring in from Republicans across the country. And Republican victories here in Nevada could jeopardize the future of our state! | | | | | | | | | | | | | Here’s why we’re fundraising this quarter: We need to reelect ... Gov. Steve Sisolak Sen. Catherine Cortez Masto Rep. Susie Lee Rep. Steven Horsford ... and we need to continue supporting Democratic leaders and ideas across the state of Nevada. Are you with us? Republicans are frighteningly close to securing a majority in the U.S. Senate, the U.S. House, and the Nevada state legislature. We simply cannot allow that to happen. | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for powering this movement, Elect Nevada Democrats | | If you'd like to support Elect Nevada Democrats, you can | Paid for by Home Means Nevada PAC.
